questions.explanation: Diện tích 1 mặt = $2 \\times 2 = 4$. Tổng 6 mặt = $4 \\times 6 = 24 cm^2$.

questions.question: What fraction of the shape is shaded?
questions.explanation: Hình vuông được chia thành 4 phần bằng nhau, 1 phần được tô màu -> 1/4.

questions.question: Which arrow shows the correct flow of energy?
questions.explanation: Năng lượng chảy từ con mồi (Prey - bị ăn) sang kẻ săn mồi (Predator - kẻ ăn).

questions.question: This represents a "Compound Shape". What shapes make it up?
questions.explanation: Hình chữ L có thể được chia thành 2 hình chữ nhật.

questions.question: Identify the "Net" of a Cube.
questions.explanation: Hình A (hình chữ thập gồm 6 ô vuông) là hình khai triển (Net) chuẩn của một hình lập phương.

questions.question: Which angle is a Right Angle ($90^{\\circ}$)?
questions.explanation: Góc A có kí hiệu hình vuông nhỏ ở góc, biểu thị góc vuông ($90^{\\circ}$).

questions.question: What is the total Volume? (Each small cube = $1 cm^3$)
questions.explanation: Hình gồm 4 khối lập phương nhỏ ghép lại ($2 \\times 2$ ở mặt trước). Tổng thể tích là $4 cm^3$.

questions.question: The arrow points to the ______ of the prism.
questions.explanation: Mũi tên chỉ vào bề mặt phẳng của hình khối -> Face (Mặt).

questions.question: Which symbol represents "Recycling"?
questions.explanation: Ba mũi tên tạo thành hình tam giác là biểu tượng tái chế quốc tế.

questions.question: Identify the "Producer" in this picture.
questions.explanation: Cây (A) là sinh vật sản xuất (Producer) vì nó tự tạo thức ăn từ ánh sáng.

questions.question: Calculate the Area of the Rectangle.
questions.explanation: Diện tích hình chữ nhật = Dài x Rộng = $10 \\times 5 = 50 cm^2$.

questions.question: Which face is parallel to the shaded face?
questions.explanation: Trong hình hộp, mặt đối diện (Opposite/Back) song song với mặt trước (Front/Shaded).

questions.question: What does the "Pyramid of Numbers" show?
questions.explanation: Tháp số lượng (Pyramid of Numbers) biểu thị số lượng cá thể ở mỗi bậc dinh dưỡng.

questions.question: Which chemical state is shown here?
questions.explanation: Các hạt (particles) sắp xếp chặt chẽ (tightly packed) và trật tự là đặc điểm của Chất rắn (Solid).

questions.question: Which tool is used to measure angle degrees?
questions.explanation: Hình bán nguyệt dùng đo độ là Thước đo độ (Protractor).

questions.question: This graph shows population growth. The trend is:
questions.explanation: Đường đồ thị đi lên (going up) biểu thị xu hướng tăng (Increasing).

questions.question: Identify the "Vertex" (Corner).
questions.explanation: Đỉnh (Vertex) là điểm giao nhau của các cạnh, được đánh dấu bằng chấm đỏ.

questions.question: Which shape corresponds to this Net?
questions.explanation: Hình khai triển có 1 hình vuông ở giữa và 4 hình tam giác xung quanh là Hình chóp đáy vuông (Square-based Pyramid).

questions.question: What time is shown? (Maths: Time)
questions.explanation: Kim ngắn chỉ số 3, kim dài chỉ số 12.

questions.question: Which animal is the "Top Predator"?
questions.explanation: Bear (Gấu) nằm ở cuối chuỗi thức ăn.

questions.question: What implies "Toxic/Poison"?
questions.explanation: Biểu tượng đầu lâu xương chéo (Skull and Crossbones) là kí hiệu quốc tế cho chất độc (Toxic).

questions.question: Calculate the Perimeter of the rectangle.
questions.explanation: Chu vi = $(5 + 2) \\times 2 = 14 cm$.

questions.question: This shape is an "Irregular Polygon" because:
questions.explanation: Đa giác không đều (Irregular) có các cạnh hoặc góc không bằng nhau.

questions.question: Which picture implies "Affordability" (Low Cost)?
questions.explanation: Kí hiệu 1 dấu $ thường biểu thị giá rẻ/phải chăng, còn nhiều dấu $ biểu thị đắt đỏ.

questions.question: Identify the "Radius".
questions.explanation: Bán kính (Radius) là đoạn thẳng từ tâm đến đường tròn (đường màu đỏ).

questions.question: What percent is represented?
questions.explanation: Một nửa hình được tô màu -> 50%.

questions.question: Which face is the "Base" of this pyramid?
questions.explanation: Mặt đáy (Base) nằm ở dưới cùng.

questions.question: This image shows "Bioaccumulation". Where is the toxin highest?
questions.explanation: Sinh vật lớn nhất tích tụ nhiều chấm đỏ (toxins) nhất.

questions.question: "Parallel Lines" are shown in:
questions.explanation: Hình A gồm 2 đường thẳng song song (không bao giờ cắt nhau).

questions.question: Which is a "Hexagon"?
questions.explanation: Hình A có 6 cạnh -> Lục giác (Hexagon).

questions.question: What is the volume if $Length=5, Width=2, Height=2$?
questions.explanation: $5 \\times 2 \\times 2 = 20$.

questions.question: Which emoticon implies "Friendly"?
questions.explanation: Mặt cười màu vàng (Smiling face) biểu thị sự thân thiện.

questions.question: Identify the "Diameter".
questions.explanation: Đường kính (Diameter) là đoạn thẳng đi qua tâm và nối 2 điểm trên đường tròn.

questions.question: Which arrow shows "Recycling Process"?
questions.explanation: Tái chế là một vòng lặp khép kín (Circular loop).

questions.question: Count the Edges of a Cube.
questions.explanation: Hình lập phương có 12 cạnh (Edges).

questions.question: Which shows a "Decomposer"?
questions.explanation: Nấm (Mushroom) là sinh vật phân hủy.

questions.question: What fraction is $50\\%$?
Which represents "Currency"?
questions.explanation: Các kí hiệu tiền tệ.

questions.question: Which shape has the most vertices?
questions.explanation: Hình vuông có 4 đỉnh, Tam giác có 3.

questions.question: Identify "Perpendicular Lines".
questions.explanation: Hai đường thẳng cắt nhau tạo góc vuông là vuông góc (Perpendicular).

questions.question: Which represents "Water"?
questions.explanation: Công thức hóa học của nước.

questions.question: Which chart is this?
questions.explanation: Biểu đồ tròn (Pie Chart).

questions.question: What does this arrow mean in a process?
questions.explanation: Mũi tên chỉ bước tiếp theo.

questions.question: Identify the correct label for X.
questions.explanation: Cạnh bên thường là Width (Rộng) hoặc Height (Cao).

questions.question: In a balanced ecosystem found in the tropical rainforest, there are organisms that have the unique ability to convert sunlight directly into chemical energy through photosynthesis. These organisms form the base of every food chain. Based on this biological function, what is the correct scientific term for an organism that **creates its own food** rather than eating others?
questions.explanation: Dựa trên ngữ cảnh convert sunlight... create its own food, đó là định nghĩa của Producer (Sinh vật sản xuất).

questions.question: Imagine you are a marine biologist observing a coastal ecosystem. You document the feeding habits of three different animals in your field notebook: Animal A (Manatee) grazes exclusively on seagrass beds; Animal B (Tiger Shark) hunts and eats smaller fish and seals; Animal C (Sea Turtle) eats both seaweed and small jellyfish. Based on these observations, classify these animals into their correct dietary groups:
questions.explanation: Herbivores (ăn thực vật - Manatee), Carnivores (ăn thịt - Shark), Omnivores (ăn tạp - Turtle).

questions.question: Read the following excerpt from an environmental news report: "Scientists are alarmed by the increasing amount of plastic waste in the ocean. Over time, waves and sunlight cause big plastic bottles to break apart into tiny particles less than 5mm in size. These particles are dangerous because fish mistake them for plankton." What is the specific scientific term used to describe these **very small particles of plastics** mentioned in the text?
questions.explanation: Dựa trên đoạn văn mô tả tiny particles of plastics, đáp án là microplastics.

questions.question:
Consider the following diagram of a simple food chain found in a paddy field.
In this biological model, specific arrows ($\\rightarrow$) are used between the organisms. Scientifically, what do these arrows **represent**?
questions.explanation: Mũi tên trong chuỗi thức ăn luôn biểu thị Transfer of energy (Sự chuyển giao năng lượng).

questions.question: In scientific texts, understanding precise vocabulary is crucial. Match the English environmental terms with their correct Vietnamese definitions:
rightCol: Có hại, chứa chất độc có thể gây chết người hoặc bệnh tật.
Tích trữ, thu thập số lượng lớn dần qua thời gian.
Phân hủy, vỡ ra thành các phần nhỏ hơn.
Chính xác, đúng đắn, không có lỗi sai.

answer.Toxic / Poisonous: Có hại, chứa chất độc có thể gây chết người hoặc bệnh tật.
answer.Accumulate: Tích trữ, thu thập số lượng lớn dần qua thời gian.
answer.Break down: Phân hủy, vỡ ra thành các phần nhỏ hơn.
answer.Accurate: Chính xác, đúng đắn, không có lỗi sai.

questions.explanation: Toxic = Poisonous (Độc); Accumulate = Collect over time (Tích lũy); Break down = Divide into smaller parts (Phân hủy).

questions.question: An environmentalist is explaining how plastic ends up on our dinner plates through a process called bioaccumulation. Read the steps below and order them logically from the beginning of the pollution to the final impact on humans:
muc: Plastic waste is thrown into the ocean and floats on the surface.
The plastic breaks down into tiny microplastics due to sun and waves.
Small marine animals and fish eat the microplastics by mistake.
Humans eat the fish that have accumulated plastics in their bodies.
answer: Plastic waste is thrown into the ocean and floats on the surface.
The plastic breaks down into tiny microplastics due to sun and waves.
Small marine animals and fish eat the microplastics by mistake.
Humans eat the fish that have accumulated plastics in their bodies.
questions.explanation: Trình tự logic: Rác thải -> Phân hủy thành vi nhựa -> Cá ăn vi nhựa -> Con người ăn cá.

questions.question: During a biology presentation, a student makes the following statement about ecosystem structures: "A **Food Web** is exactly the same as a Food Chain; it is just a single, straight line showing one animal eating another." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE based on standard biological definitions?
questions.explanation: Sai. Food Web là mạng lưới gồm nhiều chuỗi thức ăn (Food Chains) đan xen, không phải một đường thẳng đơn lẻ.

questions.question: A farmer notices that pests are eating his corn crops. He decides to use a machine to spread a liquid chemical in small drops across the entire field to kill the bugs. Which scientific verb best describes this action of **spreading liquid in small drops**?
questions.explanation: Hành động spread liquid in small drops định nghĩa cho từ Spray (Phun/Xịt).

questions.question: Scientists are studying the effects of mercury (a toxic metal) in a lake. They found that the concentration of mercury increases as it moves up the food chain: Algae $\\rightarrow$ Shrimp $\\rightarrow$ Small Fish $\\rightarrow$ Large Pike. According to the concept of **bioaccumulation**, which organism in this chain will carry the **highest level** of toxins in its body?
questions.explanation: Theo nguyên lý tích tụ (Accumulate), độc tố tăng dần và cao nhất ở sinh vật đứng đầu chuỗi (Top Predator).

questions.question: Read the sentence below regarding climate change and fill in the missing word. "The introduction of toxic chemicals into the river can negatively ________ the balance of the ecosystem, causing many to become sick." (Hint: The word starts with 'a' and means 'to cause a change in someone or something').
questions.explanation: Từ cần điền là affect (ảnh hưởng), phù hợp với định nghĩa to cause a change.

questions.question: In a detailed ecological study of a savanna, scientists identified several organisms with specific roles. Based on the definitions of energy consumption, classify the following organisms into "Producers" (make their own food) and "Consumers" (eat others):
questions.explanation: Producer tự tạo thức ăn (cây, cỏ). Consumer phải ăn sinh vật khác (sư tử, ngựa vằn, kền kền).

questions.question:
Analyze the food web diagram below regarding a forest ecosystem.
If a disease causes the population of **Rabbits** to decrease significantly, what is the most logical immediate effect on the **Hawk** population, assuming they have no other food source shown here?
questions.explanation: Nếu Thỏ (con mồi) giảm, Diều hâu (kẻ săn mồi) sẽ thiếu thức ăn và số lượng sẽ giảm theo.

questions.question: Read the warning label on a bottle of pesticide used in farming: "Caution: This substance is highly ________. Do not swallow or let it touch your skin, as it can cause serious illness or death." Fill in the blank with the most appropriate scientific adjective starting with 'T'.
questions.explanation: Ngữ cảnh "cause serious illness or death" (gây bệnh hoặc chết) định nghĩa cho từ "Toxic" (Độc hại).

questions.question: A marine biologist observes that a coral reef is dying because the water has become polluted. She notes that plastic waste does not disappear but simply divides into smaller and smaller pieces over many years. Which vocabulary phrase best describes this action of "dividing into smaller parts"?
questions.explanation: "To divide into smaller parts" là định nghĩa của cụm động từ "Break down" (Phân hủy/Vỡ ra).

questions.question: Organize the following organisms to form a correct Food Chain found in the ocean, starting from the Producer:
questions.explanation: Chuỗi thức ăn biển: Thực vật phù du -> Tôm nhỏ -> Cá voi xanh -> Cá voi sát thủ.

questions.question: In an environmental science class, a student argues: "Plastic is a natural material that decomposes quickly like an apple core, so it is not harmful to the environment." Based on your knowledge of pollution and materials, is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Nhựa (Plastic) là nhân tạo và mất rất nhiều năm để phân hủy (break down), gây hại (harmful) cho môi trường.

questions.question: When discussing environmental damage, we often use the word **"Harmful"**. Which of the following scenarios best illustrates something that is "harmful" to a food web?
questions.explanation: "Harmful" nghĩa là có hại. Việc xả hóa chất độc hại (toxic chemicals) vào sông là hành động gây hại cho lưới thức ăn.

questions.question: Complete the sentence describing a predator's behavior: "Lions are ________ because they only eat the meat of other animals like zebras and antelopes."
questions.explanation: Động vật chỉ ăn thịt (eat only animals) được gọi là Carnivores.

questions.question: Match the organisms with their correct role in the energy transfer process:
rightCol: Organism that creates its own food.
Organism that eats both plants and animals.

answer.Producer: Organism that creates its own food.
answer.Omnivore: Organism that eats both plants and animals.

questions.explanation: Định nghĩa cơ bản: Producer (Tự dưỡng), Herbivore (Ăn cỏ), Carnivore (Ăn thịt), Omnivore (Ăn tạp).

questions.question: Why are **microplastics** considered dangerous to humans?
questions.explanation: Nguy hiểm của vi nhựa là khả năng tích tụ sinh học (accumulate) trong cá và chuyển sang người khi ăn.

questions.question: A science teacher asks the class to identify the "Top Predator" in a specific food chain: Grass $\\rightarrow$ Grasshopper $\\rightarrow$ Frog $\\rightarrow$ Snake $\\rightarrow$ Eagle. Which animal holds this position?
questions.explanation: Top Predator (động vật ăn thịt đầu bảng) là sinh vật đứng cuối chuỗi thức ăn, không bị con nào khác ăn thịt.

questions.question: "To **Transfer** means to keep something in one place and never move it." Is this definition TRUE or FALSE in the context of energy moving through a food chain?
questions.explanation: "Transfer" nghĩa là chuyển đổi/di chuyển từ nơi này sang nơi khác (move from one place to another).

questions.question: Arrange the levels of a simple food chain in the correct order of energy flow (Left to Right):
questions.explanation: Năng lượng đi từ: Mặt trời -> Cây -> Động vật ăn cỏ -> Động vật ăn thịt.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: "Bears eat fish, but they also eat berries and honey. Therefore, biologically, bears are classified as ________."
questions.explanation: Ăn cả động vật và thực vật -> Omnivores (Ăn tạp).

questions.question: Look at the arrow in this diagram: Rabbit $\\rightarrow$ Fox. What does the arrow point TO?
questions.explanation: Mũi tên chỉ về phía kẻ ăn thịt (the eater), biểu thị hướng đi của năng lượng.

questions.question: Classify the following items as "Biodegradable" (Can break down naturally) or "Non-biodegradable" (Cannot break down easily, like plastic):
questions.explanation: Rác hữu cơ (vỏ chuối, lá, lõi táo) phân hủy được. Rác nhựa/xốp (chai nhựa, cốc xốp, túi ni lông) khó phân hủy.

questions.question: Which of the following is the best definition of a **Food Web**?
questions.explanation: Định nghĩa Food Web: "network of many food chains linked together".

questions.question: "The heavy rain helped to ________ the chemical spray across the whole field, contaminating the nearby river." (Hint: spread liquid)
questions.explanation: Ngữ cảnh "spread liquid... across field" ám chỉ hành động phun/xịt hoặc phát tán chất lỏng. Tuy nhiên câu này điền động từ, "spread" đã có, từ cần điền phù hợp ngữ cảnh Unit 4.2 là "spray" (dù ở đây đóng vai trò danh từ/động từ liên quan). *Correction: Dựa vào hint "spread liquid", từ gốc là Spray.*

questions.question: If a toxic substance enters the food chain at the bottom, why is it most dangerous for the animals at the top?
questions.explanation: Giải thích cơ chế Bioaccumulation (Tích tụ sinh học).

questions.question: "A **Consumer** is an organism that creates its own energy from soil." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Consumer (Sinh vật tiêu thụ) phải ăn sinh vật khác để lấy năng lượng.

questions.question: In Mathematics, specifically in 3D Geometry, what is the defining feature of a **Prism**?
questions.explanation: Định nghĩa hình lăng trụ (Prism): "a 3D shape with two parallel identical faces. All other faces are rectangles."

questions.question: Look at the math formula for calculating the space inside a container: "Length $\\times$ Width $\\times$ Height". This formula is used to calculate the ________ of a rectangular prism.
questions.explanation: Công thức $V = l \\times w \\times h$ dùng để tính Thể tích (Volume).

questions.question: Match the 3D geometry terms with their definitions:
rightCol: The total area of all the faces of a 3D shape.
The amount of space taken up by an object.
The maximum amount that a container can hold.
A shape with two identical parallel bases.

answer.Surface Area: The total area of all the faces of a 3D shape.
answer.Volume: The amount of space taken up by an object.
answer.Capacity: The maximum amount that a container can hold.
answer.Prism: A shape with two identical parallel bases.

questions.explanation: Định nghĩa chuẩn: Surface Area (Diện tích bề mặt), Volume (Thể tích), Capacity (Dung tích).

questions.question:
Which of the following shapes is a **Prism**?
(A)
(B)
(C)
(D)
questions.explanation: Hình D là hình lập phương (Cube) - một dạng đặc biệt của lăng trụ (Prism) với các mặt song song và là hình chữ nhật/vuông.

questions.question: A shape that is made up of simpler shapes (for example, an 'L' shaped block made of two rectangles) is called a ________ shape.
questions.explanation: Định nghĩa: "Compound shape (hình dạng phức hợp): a shape made up of simpler shapes."

questions.question: You have a water bottle. The amount of water it holds when it is completely full is called its:
questions.explanation: Lượng chất lỏng tối đa mà vật chứa có thể đựng là Dung tích (Capacity).

questions.question: You want to calculate the **Surface Area** of a cuboid (rectangular prism). Order the steps logically:
muc: Identify the length, width, and height of the cuboid.
Calculate the area of each of the 6 faces (Top, Bottom, Front, Back, Left, Right).
Add the areas of all 6 faces together.
Write the final answer in square units (e.g., $cm^2$).
answer: Identify the length, width, and height of the cuboid.
Calculate the area of each of the 6 faces (Top, Bottom, Front, Back, Left, Right).
Add the areas of all 6 faces together.
Write the final answer in square units (e.g., $cm^2$).
questions.explanation: Quy trình tính diện tích toàn phần: Xác định kích thước -> Tính diện tích từng mặt -> Cộng tổng -> Ghi đơn vị.

questions.question: "A cylinder is a type of prism because it has two parallel identical faces (circles)." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE according to the strict definition that other faces must be rectangles?
questions.explanation: Mặc dù Cylinder có 2 đáy tròn song song, nhưng định nghĩa Prism trong tài liệu yêu cầu "All the other faces are rectangles". Cylinder có mặt cong, nên trong bối cảnh toán học phổ thông này thường không xếp vào Prism đa diện.

questions.question:
Calculate the **Volume** of a rectangular prism with:
Length = 4 cm
Width = 3 cm
Height = 2 cm.
Formula: $V = l \\times w \\times h$
questions.explanation: $4 \\times 3 \\times 2 = 24$. Đơn vị là $cm^3$.

questions.question: Fill in the unit: "Surface area is measured in square units (like $cm^2$), whereas Volume is measured in ________ units (like $cm^3$)."
questions.explanation: Thể tích đo bằng đơn vị khối (cubic units).

questions.question: Classify the following units of measurement:
questions.explanation: Phân loại đơn vị đo: Độ dài (m, mm), Diện tích ($m^2$), Thể tích/Dung tích ($m^3$, l, ml).

questions.question:
Examine this Compound Shape made of two cuboids.
To calculate the total volume of this shape, what is the best strategy?
questions.explanation: Có 2 cách tính thể tích hình phức hợp: Chia nhỏ rồi cộng (Split and Add) hoặc Tính hình bao quanh rồi trừ phần khuyết (Complete and Subtract).

questions.question: "The **Surface Area** of a 3D shape is the amount of space inside it." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Space inside là Volume. Surface Area là tổng diện tích các mặt bên ngoài.

questions.question: What is the name of a prism where ALL faces are squares?
questions.explanation: Hình lăng trụ có tất cả các mặt là hình vuông gọi là Hình lập phương (Cube).

questions.question: If you unfold a cardboard box to make it flat, the flat shape you get is called the ________ of the 3D shape. (This helps in calculating surface area).
questions.explanation: Hình trải phẳng của một vật thể 3D gọi là "Net" (Hình trải).

questions.question: Order the units of Volume/Capacity from Smallest to Largest:
questions.explanation: Thứ tự: ml < cl < l < $m^3$.

questions.question: A swimming pool is being filled with water. Which measurement are we interested in to know how much water fits in the pool?
questions.explanation: Để biết chứa được bao nhiêu nước, ta cần tính Dung tích (Capacity).

questions.question: Match the Prism name with the shape of its base (face):
questions.explanation: Tên lăng trụ được đặt theo hình dạng mặt đáy của nó.

questions.question: Calculate the area of one face of a cube if the side length is 5 cm. Formula: $Area = s \\times s$. Answer: ________ $cm^2$.
Why do we use **square units** ($cm^2$) for Surface Area but **cubic units** ($cm^3$) for Volume?
questions.explanation: Diện tích là đại lượng 2 chiều (2D - square), Thể tích là đại lượng 3 chiều (3D - cubic).

questions.question: In a study of ocean pollution, scientists track the movement of mercury. They observe that small krill contain 0.1 units of mercury. Small fish eat 100 krill each. Large tuna eat 50 small fish each. Based on the principle of **bioaccumulation**, which statement is mathematically and biologically correct regarding the toxin level?
questions.explanation: Do cơ chế tích tụ (accumulation), độc tố nhân lên qua mỗi bậc dinh dưỡng: Cá ngừ tích tụ lượng độc từ tất cả cá nhỏ và tôm mà nó (gián tiếp) tiêu thụ.

questions.question: An ecologist classifies organisms in a forest based on how they obtain energy. Read the descriptions and group them correctly: - **Fern:** A green plant that grows in the shade. - **Mushroom:** Grows on rotting logs and breaks them down. - **Wolf:** A hunter that eats deer. - **Earthworm:** Eats decaying leaves in the soil. - **Deer:** Eats leaves and grass.
questions.explanation: Fern (Producer); Wolf, Deer (Consumer); Mushroom, Earthworm (Decomposer).

questions.question: Complete the scientist's log entry: "We found that the river water was clear, but the mud at the bottom contained high levels of lead. Over 10 years, this heavy metal has started to ________ in the tissues of the bottom-dwelling fish." (Hint: The word means 'to collect a large number of things over a long period').
questions.explanation: Ngữ cảnh "collect... over a long period" định nghĩa cho từ "accumulate" (tích tụ).

questions.question:
Examine the Trophic Pyramid diagram below.
Why is the "Producer" section at the bottom the widest part of the pyramid?
questions.explanation: Đáy tháp rộng nhất biểu thị năng lượng/sinh khối lớn nhất. Cần rất nhiều cây để nuôi sống số lượng động vật ít hơn ở trên.

questions.question: Match the environmental cause with its effect on the food chain:
rightCol: Toxic chemicals kill insects and accumulate in birds.
Marine animals eat microplastics and starve or get sick.
Herbivores lose their food source and shelter.
Top predators have no food, and prey populations grow too large.

answer.Spraying pesticides on crops: Toxic chemicals kill insects and accumulate in birds.
answer.Releasing plastic into the ocean: Marine animals eat microplastics and starve or get sick.
answer.Deforestation (Cutting down trees): Herbivores lose their food source and shelter.
answer.Overfishing: Top predators have no food, and prey populations grow too large.

questions.explanation: Logic nguyên nhân - kết quả: Thuốc trừ sâu -> Độc tố; Nhựa -> Vi nhựa; Phá rừng -> Mất thức ăn; Đánh bắt quá mức -> Mất cân bằng chuỗi.

questions.question: Trace the path of energy flow in a freshwater pond ecosystem:
questions.explanation: Năng lượng đi từ Mặt trời -> Tảo -> Nòng nọc -> Cá nhỏ -> Cò/Vạc.

questions.question: "Microplastics are only dangerous because they block the stomachs of fish; they do not contain any toxic chemicals themselves." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Vi nhựa (Microplastics) nguy hiểm vì 2 lý do: gây tắc nghẽn vật lý VÀ chúng thường chứa/hấp thụ các chất độc hại (toxic chemicals).

questions.question: A student claims: "If we kill all the mosquitoes, it will be great for humans and will not affect any other animals." From a **Food Web** perspective, why is this likely incorrect?
questions.explanation: Tư duy hệ thống: Mỗi sinh vật là một mắt xích. Muỗi là thức ăn của dơi, chim, ếch. Mất muỗi -> Mất nguồn thức ăn cho các loài này.

questions.question: "The factory waste contained mercury, a ________ metal that can damage the brain and nervous system of animals." (Hint: Another word for poisonous).
questions.explanation: "Toxic" đồng nghĩa với "poisonous" (độc hại).

questions.question: Observe the connection: Flower $\\rightarrow$ Butterfly $\\rightarrow$ Spider $\\rightarrow$ Bird. What happens to the **amount of energy** as it moves from the Flower to the Bird?
questions.explanation: Quy luật năng lượng: Năng lượng giảm dần (decreases) qua các bậc dinh dưỡng (chỉ khoảng 10% được chuyển tiếp).

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of a **Decomposer**'s job?
questions.explanation: Decomposer (sinh vật phân giải) có nhiệm vụ phân hủy xác sinh vật thành dinh dưỡng (break down dead matter).

questions.question: Classify these real-world scenarios as "Positive Impact" or "Negative Impact" on a food web:
the: Creating a protected marine reserve where fishing is banned.
Dumping chemical waste into a lake.
Using biological pest control (using ladybugs to eat aphids) instead of poison.
Cutting down a rainforest to build a mall.
Throwing plastic bags into the sea.
Replanting native trees in a damaged area.
questions.explanation: Các hành động bảo vệ/phục hồi là Positive. Các hành động ô nhiễm/phá hủy là Negative.

questions.question: Fill in the missing verb: "When plastic bottles are exposed to sun and waves, they do not disappear. Instead, they ________ down into smaller pieces called microplastics."
questions.explanation: Cụm động từ "break down" (vỡ ra/phân hủy).

questions.question: What is the primary source of energy for almost all food chains on Earth?
questions.explanation: Mặt trời (The Sun) là nguồn năng lượng khởi đầu cho hầu hết chuỗi thức ăn (thông qua quang hợp).

questions.question: Match the animal with its correct Trophic Level in a standard food chain:
questions.explanation: Thứ tự bậc dinh dưỡng: Producer -> Primary -> Secondary -> Tertiary.

questions.question: Order the correct sequence of events showing how pollution affects humans:
muc: Factories release mercury into the river.
Large fish eat many small fish, accumulating high levels of mercury.
Humans eat the large fish and get mercury poisoning.
answer: Factories release mercury into the river.
Large fish eat many small fish, accumulating high levels of mercury.
Humans eat the large fish and get mercury poisoning.
questions.explanation: Logic dòng chảy độc tố từ môi trường đến con người.

questions.question: "A **Herbivore** can be a Secondary Consumer." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Herbivore (ăn thực vật) luôn là Primary Consumer (Bậc 1) vì nó ăn Producer (Cây). Secondary Consumer là động vật ăn thịt (ăn Herbivore).

questions.question: In the Antarctic food web, krill (tiny shrimp) are eaten by whales, seals, penguins, and fish. If the krill population suddenly disappears due to climate change, what is the likely result?
questions.explanation: Krill là loài chủ chốt (keystone species). Nếu mất đi, hệ sinh thái sẽ sụp đổ (collapse) vì nhiều loài phụ thuộc vào nó.

questions.question: Which word describes a material that **cannot** be broken down by bacteria and stays in the environment for hundreds of years?
questions.explanation: "Cannot be broken down" là định nghĩa của Non-biodegradable (như nhựa, nylon).

questions.question: "Farmers use chemicals to kill pests, but these chemicals can be ________ to helpful insects like bees and butterflies." (Hint: harmful/poisonous).
questions.explanation: Trong ngữ cảnh thuốc trừ sâu, từ "toxic" (độc hại) là phù hợp nhất để mô tả tác động lên côn trùng có ích.

questions.question: Why do scientists study **Food Webs** instead of just Food Chains?
questions.explanation: Food Web phản ánh thực tế chính xác hơn (more accurate) vì động vật thường ăn nhiều loại thức ăn khác nhau (complex network).

questions.question: Identify the "Apex Predators" (Top Predators) in these different ecosystems:
questions.explanation: Apex Predator là những loài đứng đầu chuỗi, không bị loài nào săn bắt tự nhiên.

questions.question: Look at the diagram: Plant $\\rightarrow$ Aphid $\\rightarrow$ Ladybug $\\rightarrow$ Spider. In this chain, the Ladybug is acting as a ________ Consumer. (Primary, Secondary, or Tertiary?)
questions.explanation: Plant (Producer) -> Aphid (Primary) -> Ladybug (Secondary).

questions.question: Which of the following is the best example of **Microplastics**?
questions.explanation: Định nghĩa Microplastics: "fragments smaller than 5mm".

questions.question: Match the organism to its diet description:
rightCol: Eats animals that are already dead.
Hunts and eats deer and rabbits.

answer.Vulture (Scavenger): Eats animals that are already dead.
answer.Wolf (Carnivore): Hunts and eats deer and rabbits.

questions.explanation: Phân loại dựa trên thói quen ăn uống đặc thù.

questions.question: Construct a food chain that might exist in a garden:
questions.explanation: Chuỗi thức ăn điển hình trong vườn.

questions.question: "The arrows in a food chain always point FROM the eater TO the food." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Mũi tên chỉ sự chuyển giao năng lượng, nên phải trỏ TỪ thức ăn (food) SANG kẻ ăn (eater).

questions.question: If a scientist says a chemical has **accumulated** in a bird's body, what does she mean?
questions.explanation: Accumulate = Build up over time (Tích tụ dần theo thời gian).

questions.question: What happens to the "dead" energy when an animal dies and is not eaten by a predator?
questions.explanation: Vai trò của Decomposers là tái chế dinh dưỡng (recycle nutrients) về cho đất/cây.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: "A ________ is a visual tool that shows the complex feeding relationships between many different producers and consumers in an ecosystem." (Two words).
questions.explanation: Công cụ trực quan thể hiện mối quan hệ phức tạp là "Food Web" (Lưới thức ăn).

questions.question: In geometry, what is the correct definition of a **Polyhedron**?
questions.explanation: Polyhedron (Khối đa diện) là hình 3D có các mặt phẳng (flat faces), cạnh thẳng (straight edges) và đỉnh nhọn (vertices).

questions.question: Identify the shape below.
questions.explanation: Hình có 2 mặt đáy là tam giác và các mặt bên là hình chữ nhật (hoặc bình hành trên hình vẽ 2D) là Lăng trụ tam giác (Triangular Prism).

questions.question: Complete the formula for the **Volume** of a rectangular prism: $Volume = Length \\times Width \\times$ ________.
questions.explanation: Công thức tính thể tích: Dài x Rộng x Cao ($V = l \\times w \\times h$).

questions.question: If you have a cube with a side length of $3cm$, what is its **Volume**?
questions.explanation: Thể tích hình lập phương = cạnh x cạnh x cạnh ($3 \\times 3 \\times 3 = 27 cm^3$).

questions.question: Match the 3D shape parts with their correct descriptions:
rightCol: A flat surface on a 3D shape.
A line segment where two faces meet.
A 2D pattern that can be folded to make a 3D shape.

answer.Face: A flat surface on a 3D shape.
answer.Edge: A line segment where two faces meet.
answer.Net: A 2D pattern that can be folded to make a 3D shape.

questions.explanation: Định nghĩa các thành phần của hình 3D: Mặt (Face), Cạnh (Edge), Đỉnh (Vertex), Hình trải (Net).

questions.question: Order the steps to find the **Surface Area** of a rectangular box (cuboid):
muc: Measure the length ($l$), width ($w$), and height ($h$).
Calculate the area of the bottom and top faces ($l \\times w$).
Calculate the area of the front and back faces ($l \\times h$).
Calculate the area of the two side faces ($w \\times h$).
Add all the areas together: $2(lw + lh + wh)$.
answer: Measure the length ($l$), width ($w$), and height ($h$).
Calculate the area of the bottom and top faces ($l \\times w$).
Calculate the area of the front and back faces ($l \\times h$).
Calculate the area of the two side faces ($w \\times h$).
Add all the areas together: $2(lw + lh + wh)$.
questions.explanation: Quy trình tính diện tích toàn phần: Xác định kích thước -> Tính diện tích từng cặp mặt đối diện -> Cộng tổng.

questions.question: "Two shapes can have the same **Volume** but different **Surface Areas**." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Đúng. Ví dụ: Một khối lập phương 4x4x4 và một khối hộp 8x4x2 có cùng thể tích nhưng diện tích bề mặt khác nhau.

questions.question: Look at this "Net" (unfolded shape). What 3D shape will it form when folded?
questions.explanation: Hình trải gồm 6 hình vuông sắp xếp theo hình chữ thập là đặc trưng của hình lập phương (Cube).

questions.question: Convert the unit: $1$ Liter ($l$) = ________ Milliliters ($ml$).
questions.explanation: 1 lít bằng 1000 mililit.

questions.question: Which unit would you use to measure the **Capacity** of a swimming pool?
questions.explanation: Dung tích hồ bơi lớn nên đo bằng Lít ($l$) hoặc $m^3$. Trong các đáp án, Lít là hợp lý nhất cho Capacity (Sức chứa chất lỏng).

questions.question:
Calculate the **Surface Area** of a cube with side length $2 m$.
Formula: $SA = 6 \\times (side \\times side)$
questions.explanation: Diện tích 1 mặt là $2 \\times 2 = 4$. Tổng 6 mặt là $4 \\times 6 = 24 m^2$.

questions.question: Classify these objects based on their geometric shape:
questions.explanation: Prism là đa diện (phẳng). Các vật thể tròn/cong (Bóng, Lon nước, Ốc quế) không phải là Prism.

questions.question: "The amount of space occupied by a 3D object" is the definition of ________.
questions.explanation: Định nghĩa Thể tích (Volume).

questions.question:
Look at the Compound Shape below. It is made of two blocks.
If Block A is $3\\times2\\times2$ and Block B is $3\\times4\\times2$, what is the total volume?
questions.explanation: $V_A = 3 \\times 2 \\times 2 = 12$. $V_B = 3 \\times 4 \\times 2 = 24$. Tổng $V = 12 + 24 = 36$.

questions.question: Match the formula to the correct measurement concept:
leftCol: Sum of areas of all faces
questions.explanation: Phân biệt công thức Diện tích (2D), Thể tích (3D), và Diện tích bề mặt.

questions.question: Arrange the capacities from smallest to largest:
questions.explanation: Thứ tự thực tế của dung tích.

questions.question: "A **Tetrahedron** (Triangular Pyramid) is a Prism." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Prism có 2 đáy song song. Pyramid chỉ có 1 đáy và chụm lại tại 1 đỉnh (apex), nên không phải là Prism.

questions.question:
Calculate the **Volume** of a cereal box with dimensions:
Height = $20 cm$
Width = $5 cm$
Length = $15 cm$.
If a container has a volume of $1000 cm^3$, its capacity is exactly $1$ ________.
questions.explanation: Quy đổi đơn vị: $1000 cm^3 = 1$ lít.

questions.question: How many **faces** does a Rectangular Prism have?
questions.explanation: Hình hộp chữ nhật có 6 mặt (Top, Bottom, Front, Back, Left, Right).

questions.question: A cube has a Surface Area of $54 cm^2$. What is the area of **one face** of this cube?
questions.explanation: Cube có 6 mặt bằng nhau. Diện tích 1 mặt = Tổng diện tích / 6 = $54 / 6 = 9 cm^2$.

questions.question: Sort these properties into "Cube" or "Rectangular Prism" (general):
nhom: Properties of a general Rectangular Prism
the: All edges are the same length.
Opposite faces are equal, but adjacent faces might be different.
It has length, width, and height which can be different numbers.
questions.explanation: Cube là trường hợp đặc biệt với các mặt là hình vuông và cạnh bằng nhau.

questions.question: "To calculate the Volume of a prism, you multiply the Area of the Base ($A$) by the ________ ($h$)."
questions.explanation: Công thức tổng quát cho lăng trụ: $V = Base Area \\times Height$.

questions.question: Which shape corresponds to this description: "A 3D shape with 5 faces: 2 triangular bases and 3 rectangular sides."
questions.explanation: 2 đáy tam giác + 3 mặt bên hình chữ nhật = Triangular Prism.

questions.question: Match the object to its most likely Volume unit:
questions.explanation: Chọn đơn vị đo lường phù hợp với kích thước thực tế.

questions.question: Order the process to find the volume of an "L-shaped" Compound Prism:
muc: Split the "L" shape into two smaller rectangular prisms (Prism 1 and Prism 2).
Find the missing side lengths for each prism.
Calculate Volume of Prism 1 ($l_1 \\times w_1 \\times h_1$).
Calculate Volume of Prism 2 ($l_2 \\times w_2 \\times h_2$).
Add the two volumes together ($V_1 + V_2$).
answer: Split the "L" shape into two smaller rectangular prisms (Prism 1 and Prism 2).
Find the missing side lengths for each prism.
Calculate Volume of Prism 1 ($l_1 \\times w_1 \\times h_1$).
Calculate Volume of Prism 2 ($l_2 \\times w_2 \\times h_2$).
Add the two volumes together ($V_1 + V_2$).
questions.explanation: Phương pháp chia nhỏ hình (Decomposition) để tính thể tích.

questions.question: "Capacity is usually measured in cubic units like $cm^3$, while Volume is usually measured in liquid units like Liters." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Ngược lại. Volume thường dùng $cm^3/m^3$, Capacity thường dùng Liter/ml (dù chúng có thể quy đổi).

questions.question: What is the number of **Vertices** (corners) on a Cube?
questions.explanation: Hình lập phương có 8 đỉnh (4 đỉnh mặt trên + 4 đỉnh mặt dưới).

questions.question: A fish tank is $50 cm$ long, $20 cm$ wide, and $30 cm$ high. Its volume is ________ $cm^3$.
How many edges does a Triangular Prism have?
questions.explanation: 3 cạnh đáy dưới + 3 cạnh đáy trên + 3 cạnh bên = 9 cạnh.

questions.question: You need to paint the **outside** of a cardboard box. Which measurement do you need to calculate to know how much paint to buy?
questions.explanation: Sơn bên ngoài liên quan đến diện tích bề mặt (Surface Area).

questions.question: Categorize the following as "2D Shape" or "3D Shape":
questions.explanation: Phân biệt hình học phẳng (2D) và hình học không gian (3D).

questions.question: The perimeter of the base of a prism is $20cm$. The height of the prism is $10cm$. The area of the lateral surfaces (sides) is $20 \\times 10 = 200$ ________. (Fill in the unit).
questions.explanation: Diện tích xung quanh đo bằng đơn vị vuông ($cm^2$).

questions.question: Identify the correct formula for the **Volume of a Cube** with side $s$.
questions.explanation: Công thức thể tích lập phương là $s^3$.

questions.question: Match the dimension to its description in a 3D box:
rightCol: How long the object is from end to end.
How wide the object is from side to side.
How tall the object is from bottom to top.

answer.Length: How long the object is from end to end.
answer.Width (or Breadth): How wide the object is from side to side.
answer.Height: How tall the object is from bottom to top.

questions.explanation: Định nghĩa các chiều đo cơ bản: Dài, Rộng, Cao.

questions.question: Order the items by estimated Volume (Smallest to Largest):
questions.explanation: Ước lượng độ lớn thể tích trong thực tế.

questions.question: "A compound shape is always made of two different types of shapes, like a cube and a sphere attached together." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Compound shape có thể được tạo thành từ các hình giống nhau (ví dụ: 2 hình hộp chữ nhật ghép lại). Không nhất thiết phải là 2 loại khác nhau.

questions.question:
Calculate the **Surface Area** of this cuboid: $2cm \\times 3cm \\times 4cm$.
Pairs of faces: $(2\\times3)$, $(3\\times4)$, $(2\\times4)$.
To convert from Liters to Milliliters, you must ________ by 1000. (Multiply or Divide?)
questions.explanation: 1 lít = 1000 ml, nên muốn đổi từ Lít sang ml phải nhân (multiply) với 1000.

questions.question: What is the volume of a shape built from 5 unit cubes?
questions.explanation: Thể tích bằng tổng số khối đơn vị: 5 khối = 5 cubic units.

questions.question: A "Net" of a triangular prism usually consists of:
questions.explanation: Hình trải của lăng trụ tam giác gồm 3 mặt bên hình chữ nhật và 2 mặt đáy hình tam giác.

questions.question: Group the formulas by what they calculate:
questions.explanation: Phân loại công thức Diện tích (2D) và Thể tích (3D).

questions.question: A cube has a volume of $8 cm^3$. The length of one side is ________ $cm$.
questions.explanation: Tìm số $s$ sao cho $s^3 = 8$. $2 \\times 2 \\times 2 = 8$, nên cạnh là 2.

questions.question: If you cut a rectangular prism in half parallel to the base, what happens to the Volume of each new piece?
questions.explanation: Cắt đôi vật thể thì thể tích mỗi phần bằng một nửa (halved).

questions.question: Match the problem to the correct math operation needed:
leftCol: Wrapping a gift box with paper.
Putting a ribbon around the edge of a box.
questions.explanation: Ứng dụng thực tế: Đổ đầy = Thể tích; Gói quà = Diện tích bề mặt; Viền khung = Chu vi/Chiều dài cạnh.

questions.question: Order the steps to draw a Cube in 3D:
muc: Draw a second square behind and slightly to the side of the first one.
Connect the corresponding corners with straight lines.
Erase or dash the hidden lines (optional).
answer: Draw a second square behind and slightly to the side of the first one.
Connect the corresponding corners with straight lines.
Erase or dash the hidden lines (optional).
questions.explanation: Quy trình vẽ khối lập phương cơ bản.

questions.question: "A prism must have a rectangular base." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Prism có thể có đáy là tam giác, ngũ giác, lục giác... Chỉ có Rectangular Prism mới bắt buộc đáy chữ nhật.

questions.question: Which shape has the property: "Has 2 circular faces and 1 curved surface." (Note: Not a prism, but a common 3D shape).
questions.explanation: Hình trụ (Cylinder) có 2 mặt đáy tròn và 1 mặt cong xung quanh.

questions.question: The "Base Area" of a prism is $20 cm^2$. The height is $5 cm$. The Volume is ________ $cm^3$.
questions.explanation: $V = Base Area \\times Height = 20 \\times 5 = 100$.

questions.question: Why is "Surface Area" important in real life?
questions.explanation: Ý nghĩa thực tiễn của Surface Area là tính toán nguyên vật liệu bề mặt (bao bì, sơn, vải bọc...).

questions.question:
Calculate the Total Volume of this "T-shaped" structure made of two rectangular blocks.

Top Block: $4cm \\times 2cm \\times 2cm$.
Bottom Block: $2cm \\times 6cm \\times 2cm$.
questions.explanation: $V_{top} = 4 \\times 2 \\times 2 = 16$. $V_{bottom} = 2 \\times 6 \\times 2 = 24$. Tổng $V = 16 + 24 = 40 cm^3$.

questions.question: "If you double (x2) the length of all sides of a cube, the Volume will also double (x2)." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Nếu cạnh gấp đôi ($2s$), thể tích sẽ gấp $2^3 = 8$ lần. ($V = 2s \\times 2s \\times 2s = 8s^3$).

questions.question: Match the 3D shape to the number of its faces:
questions.explanation: Số mặt của lăng trụ = số cạnh đáy + 2 (2 mặt đáy). Ví dụ: Ngũ giác (5) + 2 = 7 mặt.

questions.question:
Which diagram shows the correct **Net** (unfolded shape) of a Triangular Prism?
(A)
(B)
questions.explanation: Hình B (gồm chuỗi hình chữ nhật và 2 tam giác ở hai bên) là hình trải đúng của lăng trụ tam giác.

questions.question: A rectangular tank contains $5000 ml$ of water. This is equal to ________ Liters.
Order the logic to solve this problem: "Find the height of a prism given Volume = 100 and Base Area = 25."
muc: Rearrange to solve for Height: $Height = Volume \\div Base Area$.
answer: Rearrange to solve for Height: $Height = Volume \\div Base Area$.
questions.explanation: Quy trình suy luận ngược từ Thể tích ra Chiều cao.

questions.question: Identify the **Base** of this Triangular Prism.
questions.explanation: Trong lăng trụ tam giác, "Base" (Đáy) là hai mặt đa giác song song (ở đây là hình tam giác), không nhất thiết phải là mặt nằm dưới đất.

questions.question: Classify based on the formula for Volume ($V$):
questions.explanation: Phân loại vật thể theo hình dạng Lập phương (Cube) hay Hộp chữ nhật (Rectangular Prism).

questions.question: A box has no lid (top). It measures $5cm \\times 5cm \\times 5cm$. How do you calculate its **Surface Area**?
questions.explanation: Vì không có nắp (no lid), ta chỉ tính diện tích của 5 mặt.

questions.question: "The intersection of two faces on a 3D object is called an ________."
questions.explanation: Giao tuyến của 2 mặt là một Cạnh (Edge).

questions.question:
Calculate the Volume of this Triangular Prism.
Base Triangle Area = $10 cm^2$.
Length (Height of prism) = $20 cm$.
questions.explanation: $V = \\text{Area of Base} \\times \\text{Length} = 10 \\times 20 = 200 cm^3$.

questions.question: "A **Compound Shape** volume can be found by imagining it as a big block and subtracting the missing piece." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Đúng. Đây là phương pháp "Subtraction Method" (Phương pháp trừ) để tính thể tích hình phức hợp.

questions.question: Connect the unit prefix to its meaning:
questions.explanation: Ý nghĩa các tiền tố đo lường trong hệ mét.

questions.question: How many **Edges** does a Pentagonal Prism have? (Base has 5 sides).
questions.explanation: Công thức số cạnh lăng trụ = $3 \\times n$ (n là số cạnh đáy). $3 \\times 5 = 15$.

questions.question: Sort the shapes by Number of Vertices (Low to High):
questions.explanation: Quy luật: Số đỉnh = $2 \\times n$. (3x2=6, 4x2=8, 5x2=10, 6x2=12).

questions.question: A fish tank has a capacity of $200$ Liters. How many cubic decimeters ($dm^3$) is this?
Which property makes a Cube a "special" Rectangular Prism?
questions.explanation: Đặc điểm nhận dạng đặc biệt của Cube so với hộp chữ nhật thông thường.

questions.question: Look at the L-shaped block. If you slice it vertically into two pieces, you get:
questions.explanation: Chia cắt hình chữ L theo chiều dọc hoặc ngang đều tạo ra 2 hình hộp chữ nhật (rectangular prisms).

questions.question: Formula for the Surface Area of a Cube: $SA = 6 \\times s^2$. If $s = 3$, then $SA = 6 \\times 9 = $ ________.
questions.explanation: Tính toán cơ bản: $6 \times 9 = 54$.

questions.question: "Volume is a measure of how much flat paper covers a shape." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Đó là định nghĩa của Surface Area. Volume đo không gian bên trong (space inside).

questions.question: A math student measures a box: Length = $10cm$, Width = $2cm$, Height = $5cm$. He calculates: $10 + 2 + 5 = 17$. What has he calculated?
questions.explanation: Cộng 3 chiều không ra V hay SA. Học sinh đã sai quy tắc.

questions.question: Classify real-life objects by the concept used to measure them:
questions.explanation: Phân biệt ứng dụng thực tế của Thể tích (chứa đựng) và Diện tích (bao phủ).

questions.question: If $1 cm^3 = 1 ml$, what is the volume of a $330ml$ soda can in $cm^3$?
Complete the principle: "To find the surface area of a compound shape, you must add the areas of all the ________ faces."
questions.explanation: Khi tính diện tích bề mặt hình phức hợp, chỉ tính các mặt "lộ ra ngoài" (visible/outer faces), không tính các mặt bị che khuất bên trong.

questions.question: Which geometric feature defines the "Height" of a Prism?
questions.explanation: Chiều cao lăng trụ là khoảng cách giữa 2 đáy song song (distance between parallel bases).

questions.question: Match the prism with the shape of its side faces:
questions.explanation: Lăng trụ đứng có mặt bên là hình chữ nhật. Lăng trụ xiên có mặt bên là hình bình hành. (Kiến thức mở rộng nhẹ, nhưng phù hợp logic hình học).

questions.question: Order the prisms by the number of sides on their Base (Least to Most):
questions.explanation: Sắp xếp theo số cạnh của đa giác đáy.

questions.question:
Examine this stack of unit cubes.
If the shape is 1 cube deep, how many cubes are there in total?
questions.explanation: Nhìn hình: 2 khối ở dưới + 1 khối chồng lên = 3 khối.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: "A cube has ________ equal square faces."
questions.explanation: Hình lập phương có 6 mặt vuông bằng nhau.

questions.question: Why does crushing a cardboard box make it easier to recycle?
questions.explanation: Làm bẹp hộp giúp giảm Thể tích chiếm chỗ (Volume), giúp vận chuyển/lưu trữ dễ hơn. Diện tích bề mặt và khối lượng không đổi.

questions.question: Read the job description and identify the profession: "I work in a laboratory or outdoors. I study plants, animals, and the environment found in the ocean. I often wear a wetsuit to dive underwater."
questions.explanation: Từ khóa study ocean, dive underwater chỉ nghề Nhà sinh học biển (Marine Biologist).

questions.question: Complete the reported speech sentence: Direct Speech: "I **want** to be a pilot," said Tom. Reported Speech: Tom said that he ________ to be a pilot.
questions.explanation: Trong câu tường thuật, thì Hiện tại đơn (want) lùi về Quá khứ đơn (wanted).

questions.question: Match the uniform feature with its function:
rightCol: Helps people see you clearly at night/in the dark.
Keeps you dry when working in the rain.
Protects your toes from heavy objects.
Keeps valuable items safe and hidden.

answer.Reflective stripes: Helps people see you clearly at night/in the dark.
answer.Waterproof material: Keeps you dry when working in the rain.
answer.Steel-capped boots: Protects your toes from heavy objects.
answer.Inside pockets: Keeps valuable items safe and hidden.

questions.explanation: Chức năng của các chi tiết trên đồng phục: Reflective (Phản quang), Waterproof (Chống nước), Inside pockets (Túi trong).

questions.question: Which sentence correctly changes this direct speech into reported speech? Maria said: "I **am** very tired today."
questions.explanation: am đổi thành was; today đổi thành that day. Đáp án B đúng ngữ pháp nhất.

questions.question: Classify these jobs into "Uniformed Jobs" (Must wear a specific uniform) and "Non-Uniformed/Casual Jobs" (Usually wear own clothes):
questions.explanation: Các nghề như Cảnh sát, Cứu hỏa, Y tá bắt buộc mặc đồng phục (Uniformed jobs).

questions.question: Fill in the blank with the correct job title: "A ________ helps people who have been injured to move correctly again using exercises and massage." (Starts with 'P')
questions.explanation: Nghề vật lý trị liệu (Physiotherapist) giúp phục hồi vận động.

questions.question: Why do firefighters wear uniforms made of special thick fabric?
questions.explanation: Suy luận (Inference): Đồng phục lính cứu hỏa phải chịu nhiệt để bảo vệ an toàn.

questions.question: "A **Vet** is a doctor who treats sick humans." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Vet (Veterinarian) là bác sĩ thú y (treats sick animals), không phải người.

questions.question: Order the words to form a correct Reported Speech sentence:
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc: Subject + said + that + Subject + V(past)... "She said that she liked chocolate.".

questions.question: Which feature on a police officer's belt helps them carry equipment like a radio, handcuffs, and keys?
questions.explanation: Thắt lưng có túi (Belt with pockets) dùng để đựng dụng cụ.

questions.question: "Work done for free to help others (without getting paid)" is called ________ work.
questions.explanation: Định nghĩa của voluntary work (công việc tình nguyện).

questions.question: Choose the correct reported speech for: "My brother **doesn't** like fish," said Anna.
questions.explanation: Đổi ngôi My -> Her; Lùi thì doesn't -> didn't.

questions.question: Match the word to its definition regarding clothing:
rightCol: The part of a shirt that covers your arm.
A symbol or design that shows the company/school name.
The material (cloth) used to make clothes.
Soft shoes worn for sports or casual wear.

answer.Sleeve: The part of a shirt that covers your arm.
answer.Logo: A symbol or design that shows the company/school name.
answer.Fabric: The material (cloth) used to make clothes.
answer.Trainers: Soft shoes worn for sports or casual wear.

questions.explanation: Định nghĩa từ vựng về trang phục: Sleeve (tay áo), Logo (biểu tượng), Fabric (vải), Trainers (giày thể thao).

questions.question: What does a **Computer Programmer** do?
questions.explanation: Lập trình viên (Computer Programmer) viết mã lệnh máy tính.

questions.question: A document you get from a university when you successfully finish your studies is called a university ________.
questions.explanation: Bằng cấp đại học là university degree.

questions.question: Direct Speech: "I am designing a new bridge," said the engineer. Reported Speech: The engineer said that he ________ designing a new bridge.
questions.explanation: Lùi thì Hiện tại tiếp diễn (am designing) về Quá khứ tiếp diễn (was designing). Chủ ngữ The engineer (số ít) dùng was.

questions.question: Categorize the following words into "Jobs" and "Clothes/Uniform Parts":
questions.explanation: Phân biệt danh từ chỉ nghề nghiệp và danh từ chỉ bộ phận trang phục.

questions.question: Which material would be best for a postman who has to deliver letters in the rain?
questions.explanation: Người đưa thư cần Waterproof material (chất liệu chống nước) để không bị ướt khi trời mưa.

questions.question: "Work experience" means the time you spend learning by doing a job, sometimes before you get a permanent job. Is this TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Đúng. Định nghĩa work experience (kinh nghiệm làm việc).

questions.question: A person who designs and builds machines, bridges, or roads is called an ________.
questions.explanation: Định nghĩa nghề engineer (kỹ sư).

questions.question: Look at the sentence: "The chef wears a white **suit**." What does the word "suit" mean in this context?
questions.explanation: Suit (bộ âu phục/trang phục) gồm áo và quần đồng bộ.

questions.question: Put the transformation steps of Reported Speech in order:
muc: Identify the verb tense in the direct speech.
Move the verb tense 'one step back' into the past.
Change time and place words (e.g., here -> there).
answer: Identify the verb tense in the direct speech.
Move the verb tense 'one step back' into the past.
Change time and place words (e.g., here -> there).
questions.explanation: Quy trình chuyển đổi câu tường thuật logic.

questions.question: Why might a uniform have **reflective stripes**?
questions.explanation: Reflective (phản quang) giúp an toàn trong bóng tối.

questions.question: Direct: "We **love** our job." -> Reported: They said (that) they ________ their job.
questions.explanation: Hiện tại đơn (love) -> Quá khứ đơn (loved).

questions.question: Which job is most likely to use a **remote control** as a tool? (Think creatively based on Unit 7 vocab too, or general knowledge).
questions.explanation: Mặc dù Remote control nằm ở Unit 7, nhưng trong bối cảnh công việc, nó liên quan đến kỹ thuật/TV.

questions.question: Match the Reported Speech changes (Backshift):
questions.explanation: Quy tắc lùi thì cơ bản trong câu tường thuật.

questions.question: "I teach students about chemistry and physics." Who am I?
questions.explanation: Dạy về hóa và lý là Science Teacher (Giáo viên khoa học).

questions.question: "A **Nurse** wears a uniform to keep their own clothes clean and to look professional/hygienic." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Đúng. Mục đích của đồng phục y tá.

questions.question: Select the correct Reported Speech sentence. Peter: "I **am working** late tonight."
questions.explanation: am working -> was working; tonight -> that night.

questions.question: A "belt with ________" is very useful for a carpenter or electrician to hold their tools while working.
questions.explanation: Cụm từ Belt with pockets (Thắt lưng có túi).

questions.question: Which word describes a colour that is pale, not dark? (e.g., "________ Blue").
questions.explanation: Light nghĩa là nhạt (chỉ màu sắc), đối lập với Dark.

questions.question: Classify these statements as Direct Speech or Reported Speech:
the: He said that he was hungry.
She told me that she lived in London.
questions.explanation: Direct Speech có dấu ngoặc kép. Reported Speech thường có said that/told và lùi thì.

questions.question: What is a **Vet**'s main responsibility?
questions.explanation: Vet = Bác sĩ thú y.

questions.question: Fill in the missing word: "This jacket has ________ pockets, which means the pockets are on the inner side of the jacket to hide your wallet."
questions.explanation: Inside pockets (túi bên trong).

questions.question: Choose the best word to describe a "Chef":
questions.explanation: Chef là đầu bếp chuyên nghiệp (thường là bếp trưởng), khác với waiter (người phục vụ).

questions.question: A student is describing a job to the class: "This person usually works in a hospital or clinic. They do not perform surgery, but they help people recover from accidents by doing exercises." Which job is it?
questions.explanation: Từ khóa "help people recover by doing exercises" (giúp phục hồi bằng bài tập) chỉ nghề Vật lý trị liệu (Physiotherapist).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: "To become a doctor or an engineer, you usually need to study at a university for many years to get a university ________."
questions.explanation: Cụm từ "university degree" (bằng đại học).

questions.question: Match the Direct Speech time word to its Reported Speech equivalent:
rightCol: The next day / The following day
The day before / The previous day

answer.Tomorrow: The next day / The following day
answer.Yesterday: The day before / The previous day

questions.explanation: Quy tắc chuyển đổi trạng từ chỉ thời gian trong câu tường thuật.

questions.question: Why might a "Belt with pockets" be more useful than a regular belt for a Police Officer?
questions.explanation: Lý do thực tiễn: "Belt with pockets" giúp mang vác dụng cụ và thao tác nhanh (carry tools hands-free).

questions.question: Reorder the reported speech sentence:
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc: Subject + told + Object + that + Clause (Subject + Verb...).

questions.question: "A **Marine Biologist** only studies fish that live in rivers/freshwater." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. "Marine" nghĩa là thuộc về biển/đại dương (ocean/sea), không chỉ sông ngòi.

questions.question: Direct Speech: "I **have finished** my homework," said Tom. Reported Speech: Tom said that he ________ his homework.
questions.explanation: Hiện tại hoàn thành (have finished) lùi về Quá khứ hoàn thành (had finished).

questions.question: Fill in the blank: "Firefighters wear uniforms made of special ________ that does not burn easily."
questions.explanation: Từ "fabric" (vải/chất liệu) phù hợp ngữ cảnh nói về vật liệu may mặc.

questions.question: Which job involves "creating plans for machines, engines, or electrical systems"?
questions.explanation: Định nghĩa công việc của Kỹ sư (Engineer): thiết kế máy móc, hệ thống.

questions.question: Classify the verbs into "Reporting Verbs" and "Action Verbs":
questions.explanation: Reporting verbs (động từ trần thuật) dùng để dẫn lại lời nói. Action verbs chỉ hành động.

questions.question: If a uniform has **zipped pockets**, what is the main advantage?
questions.explanation: "Zipped pockets" (túi có khóa kéo) giúp giữ đồ vật an toàn, không bị rơi (stops things from falling out).

questions.question: "Before getting a paid job, students often do some ________ experience to learn skills."
questions.explanation: Cụm từ "work experience" (kinh nghiệm làm việc/thực tập).

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence. Direct: "I will call you," said Dad. Reported: Dad said that he ________ call me.
questions.explanation: Tương lai đơn (will) đổi thành "would" trong câu tường thuật.

questions.question: Match the person to their workplace:
questions.explanation: Ghép nghề nghiệp với nơi làm việc điển hình.

questions.question: What is a **logo** on a uniform used for?
questions.explanation: Logo là biểu tượng nhận diện thương hiệu/tổ chức.

questions.question: "Reported speech always uses quotation marks (e.g., "...") around the spoken words." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Reported speech (gián tiếp) KHÔNG dùng ngoặc kép. Direct speech (trực tiếp) mới dùng.

questions.question: Which phrase best describes "Voluntary Work"?
questions.explanation: Voluntary work = Doing work without payment (Làm không công).

questions.question: Direct: "I **can** swim fast," said the boy. Reported: The boy said that he ________ swim fast.
questions.explanation: Động từ khuyết thiếu "can" đổi thành "could".

questions.question: Organize the hierarchy of medical/care jobs from "Treats Animals" to "Treats Humans":
questions.explanation: Phân loại dựa trên đối tượng chữa trị (Thú y vs Người).

questions.question: A **Science Teacher** needs to wear safety glasses and a white coat when:
questions.explanation: Trang phục bảo hộ (safety glasses, coat) cần thiết khi làm thí nghiệm (experiments).

questions.question: Identify the error in this Reported Speech sentence: "She said that she is going to the park yesterday."
questions.explanation: Lỗi hòa hợp thì: Động từ tường thuật quá khứ (said) thì mệnh đề sau phải lùi thì (was going) và đổi từ chỉ thời gian.

questions.question: "Trainers" is another word for ________ shoes, often worn by postmen for comfort.
questions.explanation: Trainers = Sports shoes (Giày thể thao).

questions.question: Sort these features into "Functional/Safety" vs "Branding/Design":
questions.explanation: Phân biệt tính năng an toàn (Safety) và tính năng nhận diện (Branding).

questions.question: Direct Speech: "My sister **works** here," said John. Reported Speech: John said that his sister ________ ________.
questions.explanation: works -> worked (lùi thì); here -> there (đổi địa điểm).

questions.question: What does a **Computer Programmer** stare at all day?
questions.explanation: Công cụ làm việc chính của Lập trình viên là màn hình máy tính (screen/code).

questions.question: "An **Engineer** is someone who repairs car engines only." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Kỹ sư (Engineer) thiết kế và xây dựng hệ thống phức tạp (cầu đường, phần mềm, máy móc...), thợ máy (Mechanic) mới là người chuyên sửa động cơ. Định nghĩa Engineer rộng hơn nhiều.

questions.question: A shirt implies formal wear, but a T-shirt is considered ________ wear.
questions.explanation: T-shirt là trang phục thường ngày (casual).

questions.question: Why do some uniforms have **Light** colors (like white or yellow)?
questions.explanation: Màu sáng (Light) giúp phản xạ nhiệt (mát hơn) hoặc dễ được nhìn thấy (an toàn).

questions.question: Match the Reporting Verb to its usage:
rightCol: Followed immediately by 'that' (e.g., He said that...)
Followed by an Object first (e.g., He told ME that...)

answer.Said: Followed immediately by 'that' (e.g., He said that...)
answer.Told: Followed by an Object first (e.g., He told ME that...)

questions.explanation: Cách dùng: Said that... vs Told someone that...

questions.question: Direct: "We **are waiting** for the bus," said the children. Reported: The children said that they ________ for the bus.
questions.explanation: Hiện tại tiếp diễn (are waiting) -> Quá khứ tiếp diễn (were waiting).

questions.question: "A ________ biologist studies ocean life."
questions.explanation: Cụm danh từ "Marine biologist".

questions.question: Which item is NOT usually part of a **suit**?
questions.explanation: Suit là âu phục trang trọng, không bao gồm quần bơi (swimming trunks).

questions.question: Arrange the sentences to show the correct transformation logic:
muc: Reported: He said he was happy.
answer: Reported: He said he was happy.
questions.explanation: Các bước chuyển đổi câu.

questions.question: A **Vet** needs to be good at:
questions.explanation: Kiến thức cốt lõi của Bác sĩ thú y là Sinh học và kỹ năng xử lý động vật.

questions.question: Direct: "I **don't** know," said She. Reported: She said that she ________ know.
questions.explanation: Don't -> Didn't.

questions.question: Read the following description of a TV programme found in a magazine: "Tonight at 8 PM, join our host Simon Cowell as he invites ordinary people to come on stage and perform their hidden talents. From singing dogs to acrobatic grandmothers, three judges will decide who wins the grand prize of $100,000. The audience can vote for their favorite performer." Based on this description, what genre of television programme is this?
questions.explanation: Mô tả về việc người thường biểu diễn tài năng (perform talents), có giám khảo (judges) và khán giả bình chọn (vote) là đặc trưng của Reality/Talent Show.

questions.question: Read the email from Sarah to her teacher explaining why she missed the class trip: "Dear Mr. Smith, I am very sorry I could not attend the museum trip yesterday. I woke up very early and prepared my bag, ________ I suddenly felt very sick with a high fever, so my mother took me to the doctor instead." Choose the correct conjunction (and / but / so / because) to fill in the blank.
questions.explanation: Ngữ cảnh thể hiện sự đối lập: Đã chuẩn bị xong (tích cực) NHƯNG đột nhiên bị ốm (tiêu cực) -> Dùng "but".

questions.question: Analyze the conversation between two friends deciding what to watch: **Tom:** "I want to watch 'The Space Wars'. It has lasers, spaceships, and aliens fighting." **Jerry:** "No, that's too loud. I want to watch 'Love in Paris'. It's about a girl who meets a baker and falls in love." What TV genres are Tom and Jerry arguing about?
questions.explanation: "Lasers, spaceships" -> Sci-Fi/Action. "Falls in love" -> Romantic film.

questions.question: A TV Guide lists the following programmes for Saturday evening. Classify them into "Educational/Factual" and "Entertainment/Fiction": - **Planet Earth:** A look at the lives of polar bears in the Arctic. - **The 6 PM News:** Updates on world events and weather. - **Friends:** A funny show about six friends living in New York. - **Star Wars:** A movie about space battles. - **MasterChef:** A competition to find the best cook. - **History of Rome:** Learning about ancient Romans.
questions.explanation: Các chương trình cung cấp kiến thức thực tế (Factual) vs Các chương trình giải trí/hư cấu (Fiction).

questions.question: Read the script snippet below: **Host:** "Welcome back. For 1,000 points, tell me: Which country is famous for Sushi?" **Contestant:** "I think it is Japan." **Host:** "Is that your final answer?" **Contestant:** "Yes." **Host:** "Correct! You win!" What type of show is this script taken from?
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Host hỏi - Contestant trả lời - Tính điểm (points) là đặc trưng của Quiz Show.

questions.question: Read the diary entry: "I really love watching cartoons like Tom & Jerry ________ they make me laugh after a long day at school." Which conjunction fits best here to explain the reason?
questions.explanation: Mệnh đề sau "make me laugh" giải thích lý do cho mệnh đề trước -> Dùng "because".

questions.question: Imagine you are a journalist writing a report. You need to interview the person who organizes the actors, cameras, and budget for a new movie. You are looking for the boss of the production. Who do you need to speak to?
questions.explanation: Người chịu trách nhiệm tổ chức, ngân sách và sản xuất phim là "Producer" (Nhà sản xuất).

questions.question: Reconstruct the dialogue sequence where Mom asks about homework:
muc: **Son:** "Because I have finished all my exercises."
answer: **Son:** "Because I have finished all my exercises."
questions.explanation: Logic hội thoại: Hỏi lý do (Why) -> Trả lời lý do (Because) -> Hỏi thời gian (When) -> Trả lời thời gian.

questions.question: Read the following TV Schedule for "Channel 5": | Time | Programme | | :

questions.explanation: Đưa ra lý do cho việc xem đến cuối (wanted to know...) -> dùng "because".

questions.question: A student describes a TV show to her friend: "It is very funny. It is about a family, but the dad is a clumsy robot. Every episode is only 20 minutes long and they get into silly trouble." What genre is she describing?
questions.explanation: Từ khóa "funny", "20 minutes long", "silly trouble" là đặc điểm của Sitcom.

questions.question: Choose the sentence that makes the most sense logically:
questions.explanation: Đáp án C dùng "Although" đúng logic nhượng bộ: Mưa (điều kiện xấu) nhưng vẫn đi dạo không ô (hành động trái ngược). Các câu khác sai logic nguyên nhân-kết quả.

questions.question: Complete the description: "A ________ opera is not about singing. It is a drama series about the daily lives, relationships, and emotional problems of a group of people, often lasting for many years."
questions.explanation: Định nghĩa chi tiết của "soap opera" (phim truyền hình dài tập về đời sống).

questions.question: Read the weather report script: "Good morning. Today will be sunny and warm in the south, however, huge storms are coming from the north. We advise everyone in the north to stay indoors." Who is the person reading this script?
questions.explanation: Nội dung về nắng, bão (sunny, storms) thuộc về Weatherman.

questions.question: Order the sequence of events described in this sentence using conjunctions: "I missed the bus, so I was late for school, although I ran very fast."

Event 3: I was late for school (The result).
answer: Event 2: I ran very fast (trying to fix it).
Event 3: I was late for school (The result).
questions.explanation: Phân tích trình tự nhân quả và nhượng bộ trong câu phức.

questions.question: "________ character do you like best: Batman or Superman?" (The speaker offers a specific choice between two options).
questions.explanation: Khi đưa ra sự lựa chọn hạn chế (Batman or Superman), từ để hỏi chính xác nhất là "Which".

questions.question: "A **Documentary** is a type of film that uses cartoons to tell jokes and make people laugh." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Đó là định nghĩa của Cartoon/Comedy. Documentary là phim tài liệu về sự thật.

questions.question: Read the dialogue: **Alice:** "Do you want to watch the horror movie?" **Bob:** "No, I'm scared." **Alice:** "Okay, we can watch the horror movie ________ we can watch the comedy. You choose." Which conjunction fits the blank?
questions.explanation: Đưa ra sự lựa chọn (You choose) -> Dùng "or".

questions.question: If you are writing a schedule for a TV channel, where would you place a "Horror Film"?
questions.explanation: Suy luận logic về thời gian phát sóng: Phim kinh dị (Horror) thường chiếu đêm muộn (Late night) để tránh trẻ em.

questions.question: Analyze the sentence: "I wanted to buy the new video game, **but** it was too expensive." What is the function of the word "but" in this sentence?
questions.explanation: "But" dùng để giới thiệu ý tương phản (muốn mua >< đắt).

questions.question: You are organizing a DVD collection. Group these titles into the correct Genre based on their descriptions: - **"The Haunted School":** Students disappear one by one at night. - **"Love at First Sight":** A boy meets a girl and they get married. - **"World War II Battles":** Real footage of tanks and soldiers in 1945. - **"Alien Attack":** Spaceships destroy New York. - **"The Funniest Clown":** A circus clown makes everyone laugh.
questions.explanation: Phân loại dựa trên nội dung cốt truyện (Description).

questions.question: "My father watches the News every day ________ he wants to know what is happening in the world."
questions.explanation: Mệnh đề sau giải thích mục đích/lý do -> Dùng "because".

questions.question: Read the synopsis: "In this series, we follow the life of a blue cat named Gumball and his walking fish brother. They go to school and have crazy adventures in a 2D animated world." What genre is this?
questions.explanation: "Blue cat", "walking fish", "animated world" -> Cartoon.

questions.question: Which Question Word would you use to ask for the **reason** in this situation? Situation: Your friend is crying. You want to know the cause. Question: "________ are you crying?"
questions.explanation: Hỏi nguyên nhân (Cause/Reason) -> Dùng "Why".

questions.question: Match the sentence start with the logical ending:
rightCol: he went swimming in the lake.
so he put on a warm coat.

answer.Although it was very cold,: he went swimming in the lake.
answer.It was very cold,: so he put on a warm coat.

questions.explanation: Logic liên từ: Although (đối lập), So (kết quả), Because (nguyên nhân).

questions.question: "The remote control is broken, ________ I have to stand up to change the channel."
questions.explanation: Điều khiển hỏng (nguyên nhân) -> Phải đứng dậy (kết quả) -> Dùng "so".

questions.explanation: Viewer là người xem (watches it). Emily là viewer.

questions.question: Rearrange the jumbled words to make a correct question:
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc câu hỏi quá khứ: Where + did + S + V + O?

questions.question: "The **News** is a programme where actors pretend to be reporters and tell made-up stories for fun." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. News (Tin tức) phải đưa tin thật (facts/real events), không phải chuyện bịa đặt (made-up stories).

questions.question: Which sentence shows the correct use of **"So"**?
questions.explanation: Đói (nguyên nhân) -> Ăn (kết quả). Dùng "so" ở giữa.

questions.question: "I don't like horror films ________ they give me nightmares." (Reason)
questions.explanation: Giải thích lý do không thích -> Dùng "because".

questions.question: A "Commercial" or "Advert" often appears in the middle of a TV show. What is its purpose?
questions.explanation: Mục đích của Quảng cáo (Advert) là bán hàng (sell product).

questions.question: "________ is your favorite singer?" - "I like Taylor Swift."
questions.explanation: Hỏi về người -> Who.

questions.question: Read the situation: "You are watching a film. There are soldiers in green uniforms, tanks driving through mud, and loud explosions." What genre of film are you watching?
questions.explanation: Các hình ảnh: soldiers, tanks, explosions đặc trưng cho War Film.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: "My mom loves romantic films, ________ my dad prefers action movies." (Contrast)
questions.explanation: Hai sở thích trái ngược nhau của bố và mẹ -> Dùng "but" (hoặc "whereas/while").

questions.question: Which question asks about **Duration** (How long)?
questions.explanation: "How long" dùng để hỏi về độ dài thời gian (Duration).

questions.question: Match the conjunction to the correct sentence logic:
rightCol: but I still failed the test.

answer.I studied hard,: but I still failed the test.

questions.explanation: Logic liên từ: So (kết quả mong đợi), Although/But (kết quả trái ngược).

questions.question: Read the TV Guide description: "**Mystery of the Pyramids:** Join Professor Jones as he explores the ancient tombs of Egypt and discovers how they were built 4,000 years ago." What genre is this?
questions.explanation: Khám phá lịch sử, khảo cổ, sự thật (ancient tombs, how they were built) -> Documentary.

questions.question: Order the words to form a question asking for a reason:
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc: Why + do/does + S + V + ...?

questions.question: "We can play video games ________ we can go to the park. We cannot do both because we don't have enough time."
questions.explanation: Chỉ được chọn 1 trong 2 -> Dùng "or".

questions.question: Who is the person responsible for telling you if you need an umbrella tomorrow?
questions.explanation: Weatherman dự báo thời tiết (nắng/mưa).

questions.question: "________ did the accident happen?" - "It happened at the corner of Main Street."
questions.explanation: Trả lời là địa điểm (corner of Main Street) -> Câu hỏi là "Where".

questions.question: "A **Remote Control** is a person who stands next to the TV and changes the channels for you." Is this statement TRUE or FALSE?
questions.explanation: Sai. Remote Control là thiết bị (device), không phải người.

questions.question: Choose the best conjunction: "I was very tired, ________ I went to bed early."
questions.explanation: Mệt (nguyên nhân) -> Ngủ sớm (kết quả). Dùng "so".

questions.question: Classify the questions based on the answer type they expect:
questions.explanation: Phân loại từ để hỏi: When/What time (Time), Who (Person), Where (Place).

questions.question: Read the script: **Character A:** "I love you, Maria. Will you marry me?" **Character B:** "Oh, Juan! I cannot marry you. I have a secret..." (Dramatic music plays). This is a typical scene from a:
questions.explanation: Kịch tính, tình cảm sướt mướt (love, secret, dramatic music) là đặc trưng của Soap Opera.

questions.question: "Although he is rich, he is very unhappy." Rewrite this sentence using "but": "He is rich, ________ he is very unhappy."
questions.explanation: Chuyển đổi cấu trúc tương đương: Although... = ...but...

questions.question: Which device converts signals into pictures and sound for you to watch?
questions.explanation: Thiết bị hiển thị hình ảnh là TV Set.

questions.question: Match the TV Show name to the most likely Question used in the show:
leftCol: "Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?" (Quiz Show)
rightCol: "Good evening, here are the main headlines."

answer.\"The Evening News\": "Good evening, here are the main headlines."
