questions.explanation: "Full rotation" là $360^{\\circ}$. Các phương trình (A) và (B) sử dụng tổng $360^{\\circ}$. Phương trình (C) và (D) chỉ sử dụng $180^{\\circ}$ (đường thẳng/tam giác).

questions.question: Reorder the following steps a student must take to accurately measure an unknown angle using a protractor.
muc: (1) Place the center mark of the protractor precisely on the vertex (point) of the angle.
(2) Align the zero line ($0^{\\circ}$) of the protractor exactly with one of the lines forming the angle.
(3) Look at where the second line of the angle crosses the curved edge of the protractor.
(4) Read the correct scale (inner or outer) depending on where the zero line was placed.
answer: (1) Place the center mark of the protractor precisely on the vertex (point) of the angle.
(2) Align the zero line ($0^{\\circ}$) of the protractor exactly with one of the lines forming the angle.
(3) Look at where the second line of the angle crosses the curved edge of the protractor.
(4) Read the correct scale (inner or outer) depending on where the zero line was placed.
questions.explanation: Quy trình chuẩn 5 bước sử dụng thước đo góc (protractor) trong môn Toán Cambridge.

questions.question: Match the pairs of angles (Left) with the specific geometric property they possess together (Right).
rightCol: Combine to form a right angle ($90^{\\circ}$).
Combine to form a full rotation ($360^{\\circ}$).
Form the interior of an equilateral triangle.

answer.$45^{\\\\circ}$ and $45^{\\\\circ}$: Combine to form a right angle ($90^{\\circ}$).
answer.$200^{\\\\circ}$, $100^{\\\\circ}$, and: Combine to form a full rotation ($360^{\\circ}$).
answer.$60^{\\\\circ}$, $60^{\\\\circ}$, and $6: Form the interior of an equilateral triangle.

questions.explanation: Đánh giá khả năng tính nhẩm nhanh và liên kết số liệu với các định lý hình học.

questions.question: A carpenter is building a wooden frame. He joins two pieces of wood. The angle on the *inside* of the joint is $75^{\\circ}$. What is the measurement of the *reflex angle* on the *outside* of the joint?
questions.explanation: Góc phản bên ngoài (reflex angle) và góc bên trong tạo thành một vòng tròn hoàn chỉnh $360^{\\circ}$. Reflex angle = $360^{\\circ} - 75^{\\circ} = 285^{\\circ}$.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: "In geometry, when two lines intersect and cross each other, the opposite angles formed (often called vertically opposite angles) are always ... in measurement." (Type a 5-letter word).
questions.explanation: Định lý hai góc đối đỉnh (vertically opposite angles) luôn luôn bằng nhau (equal).

questions.question: Classify the following scenarios into "Angles on a Straight Line" vs "Angles around a Point".
nhom: Angles on a Straight Line (Sum to $180^{\\circ}$)
the: Finding the missing angle when a line is cut by a diagonal.
Finding the reflex angle of an acute angle.
Calculating the slices of a round pie.
Two adjacent angles forming a flat surface.
questions.explanation: Flat surface / straight line liên quan đến $180^{\\circ}$. Reflex angle / round pie liên quan đến trọn vòng $360^{\\circ}$.

questions.question: Evaluate the mathematical logic: "A full rotation is $360^{\\circ}$. Therefore, an angle that is three-eighths (3/8) of a full rotation is an obtuse angle."
questions.explanation: Tính toán: $\\frac{3}{8} \\times 360^{\\circ} = 135^{\\circ}$. Góc $135^{\\circ}$ nằm trong khoảng $90^{\\circ} - 180^{\\circ}$, do đó nó CHÍNH XÁC là góc tù (obtuse angle). Lập luận đúng.

questions.question: Read the geometry problem: "Triangle ABC has two interior angles measuring $40^{\\circ}$ and $50^{\\circ}$. Because the sum of the interior angles must be $180^{\\circ}$, the third angle must measure exactly $90^{\\circ}$. Therefore, Triangle ABC is a [[right-angled|equilateral|reflex|obtuse]] triangle."
questions.explanation: Tam giác có chứa một góc $90^{\\circ}$ được gọi là tam giác vuông (right-angled triangle).

questions.question: Reorder the angle measurements to show the progression of a door opening, from completely closed to swung wide open against the wall behind it.
muc: (2) $45^{\\circ}$ (Door is slightly open, an acute angle).
(3) $90^{\\circ}$ (Door is open perfectly perpendicular, a right angle).
(4) $135^{\\circ}$ (Door is pushed far back, an obtuse angle).
(5) $180^{\\circ}$ (Door is flat against the wall, a straight angle).
answer: (2) $45^{\\circ}$ (Door is slightly open, an acute angle).
(3) $90^{\\circ}$ (Door is open perfectly perpendicular, a right angle).
(4) $135^{\\circ}$ (Door is pushed far back, an obtuse angle).
(5) $180^{\\circ}$ (Door is flat against the wall, a straight angle).
questions.explanation: Ứng dụng vòng quay góc vào tình huống mở cửa thực tế.

questions.question: Match the incorrect student calculation (Left) with the likely misconception or error they made (Right).
leftCol: Answering $80^{\\circ}$ for a missing angle on a straight line when the given angle is $110^{\\circ}$.
Calculating the reflex angle of $90^{\\circ}$ as $90^{\\circ}$.
Saying an equilateral triangle has angles of $90^{\\circ}$, $45^{\\circ}$, $45^{\\circ}$.
rightCol: Conceptual error: Straight is exactly $180^{\\circ}$, anything more is Reflex.
Using $180^{\\circ}$ instead of $360^{\\circ}$ for the total rotation.
Confusing the properties of Right-angled and Equilateral triangles.

answer.Calling a $185^{\\\\circ}$ angle a \"Str: Conceptual error: Straight is exactly $180^{\\circ}$, anything more is Reflex.
answer.Calculating the reflex angle of $90^{\\\: Using $180^{\\circ}$ instead of $360^{\\circ}$ for the total rotation.
answer.Saying an equilateral triangle has angle: Confusing the properties of Right-angled and Equilateral triangles.

questions.explanation: Nắm bắt "Misconceptions" (Các lỗi sai phổ biến) giúp học sinh tự nhận thức và tránh bẫy trong bài thi.

questions.question: A camera is mounted on a tripod and can rotate a full $360^{\\circ}$. It starts facing North. It rotates $150^{\\circ}$ clockwise to take a picture, then rotates $200^{\\circ}$ counter-clockwise (backward) to take another picture. What is the camera's final angle relative to its starting North position, and what type of angle is it?
questions.explanation: Quay tới $150^{\\circ}$, quay lùi $200^{\\circ}$ $\\Rightarrow$ Vị trí cuối là lùi (counter-clockwise) $50^{\\circ}$ so với mốc 0 ban đầu. Góc $50^{\\circ}$ là góc nhọn (Acute).

questions.question: Complete the rule: "When writing geometry answers, you must always include the small circle symbol after the number to indicate that the unit of measurement is ... (spelled in plural)."
questions.explanation: Ký hiệu $^{\\circ}$ trong tiếng Anh đọc và viết là "degrees" (độ).

questions.question: Which of the following visual descriptions would create an "Obtuse angle"? (Select 2 correct answers).

options.a: The corner of a standard square tile.
options.b: The angle between the hands of a clock at exactly 5:00.
options.c: A laptop screen pushed back slightly further than a perfect upright position.
options.d: A pair of scissors opened just a tiny bit to cut a thread.

questions.explanation: (A) là góc vuông $90^{\\circ}$. (B) là $150^{\\circ}$ (tù). (C) màn hình ngửa ra sau hơn $90^{\\circ}$ là góc tù. (D) mở hé là góc nhọn.

questions.question: Read the text: "The London Eye is a giant Ferris wheel. If a passenger cabin travels exactly one-third ($1/3$) of the way around the wheel, it has moved through an angle of [[$120^{\\circ}$|$90^{\\circ}$|$180^{\\circ}$|$60^{\\circ}$]]."
questions.explanation: Một vòng là $360^{\\circ}$. Một phần ba của $360^{\\circ}$ là $120^{\\circ}$ ($360 \\div 3 = 120$).

questions.question: Evaluate the statement: "If you add two acute angles together, the result will always be an obtuse angle."
questions.explanation: Lập luận này sai. Ví dụ: $20^{\\circ}$ (acute) + $30^{\\circ}$ (acute) = $50^{\\circ}$ (vẫn là acute). Không phải lúc nào cũng ra góc tù.

questions.question: Order the following times based on the size of the internal angle created by the clock's hands, from SMALLEST angle to LARGEST angle.
questions.explanation: Xếp theo độ lớn góc: $30^{\\circ} < 60^{\\circ} < 90^{\\circ} < 150^{\\circ} < 180^{\\circ}$.

questions.question: Classify the angle sizes into their designated names. This is a rapid-fire recognition test.
questions.explanation: Reflex > $180^{\\circ}$. Obtuse < $180^{\\circ}$ (và > $90^{\\circ}$).

questions.question: Match the architectural problem with the geometric solution to calculate the missing angle.
leftCol: A straight support beam has a $45^{\\circ}$ bracket attached. What is the remaining angle on the beam?
A circular table is divided. One section takes up $200^{\\circ}$. What is the remaining angle?
A right-angled corner of a room is split by a wall. One side is $30^{\\circ}$. What is the other?
A triangle roof has two base angles of $40^{\\circ}$. What is the top angle?
questions.explanation: Kết nối tình huống với phép tính phù hợp.

questions.question: Four angles are grouped around a central point. Three of the angles measure $100^{\\circ}$, $110^{\\circ}$, and $60^{\\circ}$. What is the measurement of the fourth angle?
questions.explanation: Tổng các góc quanh một điểm là $360^{\\circ}$. Góc thứ tư = $360^{\\circ} - (100^{\\circ} + 110^{\\circ} + 60^{\\circ}) = 360^{\\circ} - 270^{\\circ} = 90^{\\circ}$.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: "An angle that is exactly half the size of a Right angle ($90^{\\circ}$) will measure exactly ... degrees." (Type the number only).
questions.explanation: Một nửa của góc vuông ($90^{\\circ} \\div 2$) là $45^{\\circ}$.

questions.question: "A wind turbine has 3 perfectly spaced blades. The angle between any two adjacent blades is exactly [[$120^{\\circ}$|$90^{\\circ}$|$60^{\\circ}$|$180^{\\circ}$]], which is classified as an obtuse angle."
questions.explanation: Vòng tròn $360^{\\circ}$ chia cho 3 cánh quạt = $120^{\\circ}$.

questions.question: Evaluate: "If a shape is described as having 4 right angles, it must logically be either a square or a rectangle, as the internal angles add up to $360^{\\circ}$."
questions.explanation: 4 góc vuông ($4 \\times 90^{\\circ} = 360^{\\circ}$) là đặc điểm cơ bản xác định hình chữ nhật (hoặc hình vuông). Nhận định hoàn toàn đúng.

questions.question: Reorder the instructions to properly draw an angle of $75^{\\circ}$ using a protractor and ruler.
muc: (1) Use the ruler to draw a straight horizontal baseline.
(2) Place the protractor's center point on one end of the baseline.
(3) Ensure the $0^{\\circ}$ line on the protractor matches the baseline perfectly.
(4) Find the $75^{\\circ}$ mark on the correct scale and make a small dot on the paper.
(5) Remove the protractor and use the ruler to draw a line connecting the end of the baseline to the dot.
answer: (1) Use the ruler to draw a straight horizontal baseline.
(2) Place the protractor's center point on one end of the baseline.
(3) Ensure the $0^{\\circ}$ line on the protractor matches the baseline perfectly.
(4) Find the $75^{\\circ}$ mark on the correct scale and make a small dot on the paper.
(5) Remove the protractor and use the ruler to draw a line connecting the end of the baseline to the dot.
questions.explanation: Kỹ năng thực hành vẽ góc (Constructing angles) là một phần bắt buộc trong Unit 13.

questions.question: A student is reading a science manual to build a small robotic toy. The instructions state: "You must provide a power source of exactly 3 Volts to make the motor run." The student looks in the supply box and only finds standard 1.5V power units. What must the student do, and what is the scientific name for this new combined unit?

options.a: Use one 1.5V unit; it is called a cell.
options.b: Join two 1.5V units together; it is called a battery.
options.c: Join three 1.5V units together; it is called a buzzer.
options.d: Cut a 1.5V unit in half; it is called an open switch.

questions.explanation: Một đơn vị 1.5V gọi là "Cell" (Pin đơn). Để có 3V, học sinh phải ghép 2 cells lại. Khi hai hoặc nhiều cells ghép lại với nhau, hệ thống đó mới được gọi chính thức là "Battery" (Bộ pin).

questions.question: Analyze the following text from a physics textbook: "When scientists and engineers design complex electrical systems, they do not draw realistic, detailed pictures of every single component because it takes too much time and space. Instead, they use a universal set of simple, standardized lines and shapes called circuit ... to represent each part clearly." Fill in the blank with a plural noun.
questions.explanation: Các đường nét và hình khối tiêu chuẩn dùng để vẽ mạch điện được gọi là "Circuit symbols" (Ký hiệu mạch điện).

questions.question: Evaluate the following logical deduction made by a 6th-grade student: "In everyday language, my mom tells me to 'open the light' when the room is dark. Therefore, in a scientific circuit diagram, if I want the bulb to light up and shine brightly, I must ensure the diagram shows an 'open switch'."
questions.explanation: Đây là "Bẫy Tư duy ngược" kinh điển. Trong Khoa học, "Open switch" (công tắc mở) có nghĩa là mạch bị hở/đứt đoạn -> dòng điện KHÔNG chạy qua -> đèn TẮT. Để đèn sáng, ta phải dùng "Closed switch" (công tắc đóng) để tạo mạch kín.

questions.question: An electrical engineer is testing various circuit configurations on a simulator. Classify the following circuit descriptions based on whether the final output device (bulb/buzzer) will currently ACTIVATE (turn on) or FAIL TO ACTIVATE (stay off).
the: A circuit with a 3V battery, intact connecting wires, and a closed switch.
A circuit with a 1.5V cell, a broken wire, and a closed switch.
A circuit with a battery, intact wires, and an open switch.
A simple unbroken loop of wire connecting a cell directly to a buzzer with no switch.
questions.explanation: Mạch bị đứt dây (broken wire) hoặc công tắc hở (open switch) sẽ làm mạch hỏng (FAIL). Mạch kín hoàn toàn, dù có hay không có công tắc, thiết bị vẫn sẽ hoạt động (ACTIVATE).

questions.question: Match the precise scientific names of the circuit components (Left) with their standard visual representations in a circuit diagram (Right).
rightCol: A long thin line next to a shorter, thicker line.
Two or more pairs of long and short lines connected together.
A simple, straight, solid black line.
A circle with a cross (X) drawn inside it.

answer.A Cell: A long thin line next to a shorter, thicker line.
answer.A Battery: Two or more pairs of long and short lines connected together.
answer.A Connecting Wire: A simple, straight, solid black line.
answer.A Bulb: A circle with a cross (X) drawn inside it.

questions.explanation: Học sinh bắt buộc phải thuộc lòng các ký hiệu mạch điện (Circuit symbols) cơ bản nhất để làm bài thi Science.

questions.question: Reorder the steps logically to describe the sequential flow of electrical energy in a successfully operating, simple alarm circuit.
muc: (1) Electrical energy leaves the positive terminal of the 3V battery.
(2) The current travels along the copper connecting wire.
(3) The current passes safely through the closed switch.
(4) The energy reaches the buzzer, converting the electrical energy into a loud sound.
(5) The current continues along the wire back to the negative terminal, completing the loop.
answer: (1) Electrical energy leaves the positive terminal of the 3V battery.
(2) The current travels along the copper connecting wire.
(3) The current passes safely through the closed switch.
(4) The energy reaches the buzzer, converting the electrical energy into a loud sound.
(5) The current continues along the wire back to the negative terminal, completing the loop.
questions.explanation: Dòng điện chạy từ cực dương, qua dây dẫn, qua công tắc đóng, tới thiết bị tiêu thụ (còi), và trở về cực âm tạo thành một vòng khép kín.

questions.question: Read the scenario: "The security team wants to install a warning system on the vault door. When the door is opened by a thief, it acts as a closed switch, completing a hidden circuit. To ensure the guards hear the alarm immediately, the engineer must include a [[buzzer|bulb|cell|wire]] in the circuit design."
questions.explanation: Hệ thống cảnh báo cần âm thanh để bảo vệ (hear the alarm), do đó thiết bị cần thêm vào là "buzzer" (còi báo). Bulb (bóng đèn) chỉ phát sáng chứ không phát ra tiếng động.

questions.question: A student raises their hand in the science lab and says, "Teacher, I built the circuit exactly as shown. I have a battery, a switch, and a bulb. My switch is currently in the 'closed' position, but the bulb is NOT lighting up at all!" Based on troubleshooting logic, which of the following are valid scientific reasons for this failure? (Select 2 correct answers).

options.a: One of the connecting wires has a hidden break inside the plastic cover.
options.b: The battery has completely run out of stored chemical energy (it is dead/flat).
options.c: The switch is successfully creating a continuous, unbroken path for the electricity.
options.d: The circuit contains a cell instead of a buzzer.

questions.explanation: Mặc dù công tắc đã đóng (closed), nhưng nếu dây đứt ngầm (a) hoặc pin đã hết điện (b) thì mạch vẫn không hoạt động. Phương án (c) là điều kiện tốt, không phải nguyên nhân gây lỗi.

questions.question: Examine the technical specifications for a new smart home device (MOET Unit 10 integration): "This wireless temperature sensor is extremely small and requires very little voltage to operate. In fact, a 3V battery would overload and fry the system." Based on this, what is the most appropriate power source to draw in the circuit diagram for this sensor?

options.a: A single 1.5V cell (one long line, one short line).
options.b: A 3V battery (two pairs of long and short lines).

questions.explanation: 3V là quá tải (overload), thiết bị cần điện áp rất nhỏ. Do đó, nguồn điện phù hợp nhất là một "Cell" (Pin đơn) có điện áp 1.5V.

questions.question: Complete the sentence from a laboratory safety guideline: "When you have finished your experiment, you must immediately press the button to create an ... (a state where the circuit is broken). This stops the flow of electricity and prevents the battery from draining unnecessarily."
questions.explanation: Trạng thái làm ngắt mạch điện, ngăn dòng điện chạy qua là "open switch" (công tắc mở).

questions.question: Evaluate this statement made by a peer: "If I draw a circuit diagram with a battery, a wire, and a bulb, but the wire is drawn as a squiggly, messy line instead of a straight line with a ruler, the actual physical circuit built from this diagram will definitely not work."
questions.explanation: Sơ đồ mạch điện (circuit diagram) thường dùng đường thẳng cho gọn gàng, nhưng việc vẽ dây dẫn ngoằn ngoèo trên giấy KHÔNG làm ảnh hưởng đến nguyên lý hoạt động của mạch thực tế, miễn là các kết nối không bị đứt.

questions.question: A technician is diagnosing a faulty doorbell. The homeowner presses the button, but there is no sound. The technician checks the power source and finds it is a single 1.5V cell. The doorbell's manual states: "Minimum operating voltage requirement: 3 Volts." The technician realizes he needs to replace the cell with a [[battery|bulb|open switch|wire]].
questions.explanation: Thiết bị cần tối thiểu 3V. Một "cell" chỉ có 1.5V. Kỹ thuật viên cần nâng cấp lên "battery" (bộ pin ghép từ 2 cells trở lên) để đạt 3V.

questions.question: Reorder the components to correctly construct a standard, scientifically accurate written description of a functioning simple circuit, starting from the power source.
muc: (1) A 1.5V cell provides the necessary electrical energy.
(2) A connecting wire carries the current away from the cell.
(3) A closed switch allows the current to safely pass through without interruption.
(4) A bulb receives the current and converts it into light energy.
(5) Another connecting wire returns the current to the cell, completing the circuit.
answer: (1) A 1.5V cell provides the necessary electrical energy.
(2) A connecting wire carries the current away from the cell.
(3) A closed switch allows the current to safely pass through without interruption.
(4) A bulb receives the current and converts it into light energy.
(5) Another connecting wire returns the current to the cell, completing the circuit.
questions.explanation: Mô tả tuần tự các thành phần trên đường đi của dòng điện trong một mạch kín.

questions.question: Match the visual characteristic of a circuit symbol (Left) with the specific component it represents (Right) to test visual memory of Science Unit 5.4.
leftCol: Two small circles with a straight line bridging the gap between them.
Two small circles with a line pointing diagonally upwards, creating a gap.
A half-circle shape with two small legs sticking out from the flat bottom.
A circle containing a large \"X\" through the middle.
questions.explanation: Học sinh cần nhớ chính xác các chi tiết nhỏ trong ký hiệu (đặc biệt là sự khác biệt giữa open và closed switch, và hình dạng của buzzer).

questions.question: Classify the following scenarios to determine if they describe a system that is "In Series" (one single continuous path) or "Broken/Incomplete" (current cannot flow).
the: Cell $\\rightarrow$ Wire $\\rightarrow$ Closed Switch $\\rightarrow$ Bulb $\\rightarrow$ Cell.
Battery $\\rightarrow$ Wire $\\rightarrow$ Open Switch $\\rightarrow$ Buzzer $\\rightarrow$ Battery.
Battery $\\rightarrow$ Wire $\\rightarrow$ Bulb $\\rightarrow$ Wire $\\rightarrow$ (Cut end of wire).
questions.explanation: Mạch có "Open Switch" hoặc "Cut end of wire" (dây bị cắt) đều là mạch hở (Incomplete). Mạch không có công tắc nhưng khép kín hoàn toàn vẫn là mạch hoạt động (Complete).

questions.question: Look at the mental image of this circuit diagram: There is a 3V battery at the top. A wire goes down to an open switch. From the switch, the wire goes to a bulb. From the bulb, the wire goes to a buzzer. Finally, the wire returns to the battery. If you look at this circuit right now, what is happening?

options.a: The bulb is shining brightly, and the buzzer is loud.
options.b: The bulb is off, but the buzzer is making a sound.
options.c: Neither the bulb nor the buzzer is working.

questions.explanation: Vì công tắc đang ở trạng thái "open switch" (mở/ngắt mạch), toàn bộ dòng điện bị chặn lại. Do đó, KHÔNG có thiết bị nào (cả đèn và còi) có thể hoạt động.

questions.question: Complete the physics concept: "The electrical pressure that pushes the current through the connecting wires in a circuit is measured in units called ... (a 5-letter word starting with V)."
questions.explanation: Điện áp (Voltage) đo bằng đơn vị "volts" (V), ví dụ 1.5V hay 3V.

questions.question: A homeowner is trying to install a "wireless TV" (from MOET Unit 10) in their motorhome. However, the TV requires a direct connection to the vehicle's internal power circuit to function initially. The engineer draws a circuit diagram. Which of the following symbols MUST be present in the diagram to ensure the TV receives power and can be turned on and off safely? (Select 2 correct answers).

options.a: A battery symbol (to provide strong power).
options.b: A buzzer symbol (to make it loud).
options.c: A switch symbol (to control the power flow).
options.d: A cloud symbol (to connect to Wi-Fi).

questions.explanation: Để mạch điện TV hoạt động và có thể điều khiển được, bắt buộc phải có Nguồn điện (Battery) và thiết bị điều khiển đóng/ngắt mạch (Switch).

questions.question: Read the troubleshooting guide for a flashlight: "If the flashlight does not turn on when you slide the button forward, first check the power source. The flashlight requires 3V to operate. If you open the casing and only see a single 1.5V [[cell|battery|bulb|buzzer]], the device will not have enough power to produce light."
questions.explanation: Một viên pin 1.5V là "cell". Nó không đủ điện áp 3V để đèn pin hoạt động.

questions.question: Evaluate the statement: "In a circuit diagram, drawing two cells connected together (a long line, a short line, another long line, another short line) represents a 3V battery."
questions.explanation: Ký hiệu của "Battery" chính xác là hai hoặc nhiều "Cells" ghép nối tiếp nhau. Mỗi cell 1.5V, hai cells sẽ là 3V. Nhận định này hoàn toàn đúng.

questions.question: Match the action performed on a physical circuit (Left) with the resulting change in the circuit diagram's scientific symbols (Right).
leftCol: You press the alarm button down to activate the siren.
You add a second 1.5V power unit into the battery holder.
You accidentally cut the copper cord with a pair of scissors.
You replace the light-emitting device with a sound-emitting device.
rightCol: The symbol changes from an 'open switch' to a 'closed switch'.
The symbol changes from a single 'cell' to a 'battery'.
The solid 'connecting wire' line now has a gap in it.
The 'circle with an X' is replaced by a 'half-circle with legs'.

answer.You press the alarm button down to activ: The symbol changes from an 'open switch' to a 'closed switch'.
answer.You add a second 1.5V power unit into th: The symbol changes from a single 'cell' to a 'battery'.
answer.You accidentally cut the copper cord wit: The solid 'connecting wire' line now has a gap in it.
answer.You replace the light-emitting device wi: The 'circle with an X' is replaced by a 'half-circle with legs'.

questions.explanation: Đòi hỏi sự liên kết giữa hành động thực tế và cách biểu diễn trừu tượng trên sơ đồ mạch điện.

questions.question: An architect is designing a circuit for an "electric cooker" (Unit 10) in a modern apartment. Order the steps taken by the electricity from the moment the user interacts with the appliance.
muc: (1) The user pushes the power button on the cooker.
(2) Inside the machine, an open switch becomes a closed switch.
(3) The 220V electrical current flows rapidly through the connecting wires.
(4) The electricity reaches the heating elements, converting into thermal energy.
(5) The electric cooker successfully heats up the food.
answer: (1) The user pushes the power button on the cooker.
(2) Inside the machine, an open switch becomes a closed switch.
(3) The 220V electrical current flows rapidly through the connecting wires.
(4) The electricity reaches the heating elements, converting into thermal energy.
(5) The electric cooker successfully heats up the food.
questions.explanation: Quá trình chuyển đổi từ hành động bấm nút -> Đóng mạch -> Dòng điện chạy -> Chuyển hóa năng lượng -> Kết quả.

questions.question: Distinguish between the vocabulary of Global English (Nature's Power) and Science (Circuits). Classify the following terms based on their primary subject context.
questions.explanation: Giúp học sinh phân định rõ ràng các thuật ngữ liên môn. (Lightning là dòng điện tự nhiên, Cell/Switch là linh kiện nhân tạo).

questions.question: A student designs a simple circuit to test materials. The circuit consists of a battery, a bulb, and two loose connecting wires. When the student touches the two loose wires to a metal spoon, the bulb lights up. When the student touches the wires to a plastic ruler, the bulb remains dark. What does this experiment prove about the "connecting wires" and the circuit?

options.a: The plastic ruler acts as a closed switch, but the bulb is broken.
options.b: The metal spoon completes the circuit, acting like an extra connecting wire.
options.c: The battery is empty when touching the plastic ruler.
options.d: The metal spoon turns into a 3V battery.

questions.explanation: Kim loại (spoon) dẫn điện, nên nó kết nối hai đầu dây lỏng lẻo, hoàn thành mạch điện (completes the circuit) giống như một đoạn dây dẫn (connecting wire). Nhựa cách điện nên mạch vẫn hở.

questions.question: Complete the definition from the exam review sheet: "A ... (7-letter word) is an electrical component that converts electrical energy into an audible warning sound. Its circuit symbol looks like a mushroom or a half-circle on two legs."
questions.explanation: Thiết bị chuyển điện thành âm thanh (audible sound) có hình nửa vòng tròn (half-circle) là "buzzer" (còi báo).

questions.question: In a circuit diagram, the straight lines representing the [[connecting wires|hot air|clouds|thunder]] must always be drawn completely touching the components (like the cell or bulb) to show that there is no break in the electrical path.
questions.explanation: Các đường thẳng trong sơ đồ mạch điện biểu diễn "connecting wires" (dây dẫn) và phải chạm vào linh kiện để tạo mạch kín.

questions.question: Evaluate the scientific statement: "If you have a circuit with a 3V battery, a closed switch, and two bulbs connected one after the other in a single loop, removing one of the bulbs will leave an empty gap, causing the other bulb to turn off."
questions.explanation: Trong một mạch nối tiếp (single loop), nếu tháo một bóng đèn ra, nó sẽ tạo ra một khoảng hở (gap) giống như một open switch. Toàn bộ mạch bị ngắt và bóng đèn còn lại cũng sẽ tắt. Lập luận vật lý chính xác.

questions.question: Which of the following components are mathematically required to build a standard "3V battery" according to the Cambridge Science curriculum? (Select 2 correct answers).

options.c: Connecting them so their voltages add up ($1.5V + 1.5V = 3V$).
options.d: A buzzer to multiply the voltage.

questions.explanation: Để có một "3V battery", ta phải kết hợp hai viên pin đơn (b) và cộng gộp điện áp của chúng lại $1.5 + 1.5 = 3$ (c). Còi (buzzer) không sinh ra điện.

questions.question: Match the real-world household actions (from MOET Unit 10) with the internal circuit changes occurring inside the appliances.
leftCol: You turn off the "electric cooker" because the rice is done.
You put two new AA batteries into the "wireless TV" remote.
You plug the "dishwasher" into the wall socket.
A rat chews through the main cable of your "solar energy" system.
rightCol: The internal switch changes from 'closed' to 'open'.
You are adding a 3V power source to the circuit.
You are connecting the device to a massive external power grid.
A 'connecting wire' is severely broken, creating an incomplete circuit.

answer.You turn off the \"electric cooker\" bec: The internal switch changes from 'closed' to 'open'.
answer.You put two new AA batteries into the \": You are adding a 3V power source to the circuit.
answer.You plug the \"dishwasher\" into the wal: You are connecting the device to a massive external power grid.
answer.A rat chews through the main cable of yo: A 'connecting wire' is severely broken, creating an incomplete circuit.

questions.explanation: Tích hợp kiến thức Science vào tình huống thực tế của chủ đề "Houses in the Future".

questions.question: Reorder the words to form a crucial rule for drawing scientific circuit diagrams correctly.
questions.explanation: Quy tắc vẽ sơ đồ chuẩn: "Always use a ruler to draw the connecting wires as straight lines."

questions.question: Look at this described circuit: A 3V battery is connected by a wire to a closed switch. From the switch, a wire splits into two separate paths. Path A goes to a bulb. Path B goes to a buzzer. Both paths then return via wire to the battery. What happens if the bulb suddenly breaks?

options.a: Both the bulb and the buzzer stop working.
options.b: The bulb stops working, but the buzzer continues to make a sound.
options.c: The buzzer stops working, but the bulb shines brighter.

questions.explanation: Vì mạch bị chia làm hai nhánh riêng biệt (mạch song song - parallel circuit), sự cố đứt mạch ở bóng đèn (Path A) không ảnh hưởng đến dòng điện đang chạy qua còi (Path B). Còi vẫn kêu bình thường.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: "In a circuit diagram, the symbol for a bulb is a circle with a cross inside it, which looks like a capital letter ... ." (Type a single English letter).
questions.explanation: Ký hiệu của bóng đèn (bulb) là một vòng tròn có chữ "X" (cross) ở giữa.

questions.question: Classify the electrical components based on their primary function in a circuit: "Source of Energy" (Provides power) or "Consumer of Energy" (Uses power).
nhom: Source of Energy (Cung cấp năng lượng)
Consumer of Energy (Tiêu thụ năng lượng)
questions.explanation: Cell, Battery, Solar Panel là các nguồn phát điện. Bóng đèn, còi, nồi cơm điện là các thiết bị tiêu thụ và chuyển hóa điện năng.

questions.question: When writing an exam paper, a student mistakenly draws a long line and a short line, followed by a gap, and then another long line and short line. This is incorrect. To properly draw a [[battery|cell|buzzer|bulb]], the lines representing the multiple cells must be connected with a dotted or solid line to show they are joined.
questions.explanation: Ký hiệu của Battery (nhiều cells) không được rời rạc mà phải có đường nét gạch nối (dotted/solid line) giữa các cặp đường dài/ngắn để thể hiện chúng đang được ghép lại với nhau.

questions.question: Evaluate this safety warning: "If you connect a simple wire directly from the positive terminal of a 3V battery straight back to the negative terminal without adding any bulb or buzzer in the middle, the circuit will safely do nothing."
questions.explanation: Đây là hiện tượng đoản mạch (short circuit). Dòng điện quá lớn sẽ chạy qua dây dẫn mà không bị cản lại bởi thiết bị tiêu thụ nào, khiến pin và dây dẫn cực kỳ nóng, có thể gây cháy nổ. Khẳng định "safely do nothing" là sai và rất nguy hiểm.

questions.question: Match the diagnostic observation of a circuit (Left) with the most highly probable technical fault (Right).
leftCol: The bulb was shining brightly, but suddenly went completely dark without anyone touching the switch.
The circuit is fully assembled with a closed switch, but the buzzer is completely silent from the start.
The diagram shows a 3V battery, but the physical circuit only has one single cell.
The switch is pressed down, but the metallic contacts inside it are dirty and rusted.
rightCol: The filament inside the bulb has broken (the bulb blew out).
The 1.5V cell was accidentally placed in the holder backwards.
The physical model does not match the required voltage of the blueprint.
The switch is failing to create a proper electrical connection.

answer.The bulb was shining brightly, but sudde: The filament inside the bulb has broken (the bulb blew out).
answer.The circuit is fully assembled with a cl: The 1.5V cell was accidentally placed in the holder backwards.
answer.The diagram shows a 3V battery, but the: The physical model does not match the required voltage of the blueprint.
answer.The switch is pressed down, but the meta: The switch is failing to create a proper electrical connection.

questions.explanation: Tư duy phân tích lỗi (Troubleshooting) ở cấp độ Vận dụng cao.

questions.question: Reorder the sentence to describe how a natural phenomenon from Unit 7 can affect an artificial circuit from Unit 5.4.
questions.explanation: Kết nối đa môn (Cross-curricular): Bão sấm sét (hiện tượng tự nhiên) phá hủy dây dẫn điện (linh kiện nhân tạo).

questions.question: An engineer is modifying a circuit diagram for a warning system. Currently, the diagram shows a cell, a closed switch, and a buzzer. The engineer erases the 'closed switch' symbol and draws an 'open switch' symbol instead. What is the immediate physical consequence of this drawing change on the real-life machine built from it?

options.a: The machine will now produce a louder sound.
options.b: The machine is now permanently turned off and will not make a sound.
options.c: The machine will explode due to high voltage.
options.d: The buzzer will turn into a bulb.

questions.explanation: Việc đổi từ "closed switch" (mạch kín) sang "open switch" (mạch hở) trên bản thiết kế đồng nghĩa với việc cỗ máy thực tế sẽ luôn ở trạng thái bị ngắt điện (turned off).

questions.question: Fill in the blank: "In standard scientific notation, a 1.5V ... (a 4-letter word) is the fundamental building block of all portable power sources. When you need more power, you combine several of them."
questions.explanation: "Cell" (pin đơn) là đơn vị nền tảng nhỏ nhất để tạo ra các nguồn năng lượng di động.

questions.question: Which of the following statements about "Connecting wires" in a circuit diagram are TRUE? (Select 2 correct answers).

options.a: They are always drawn as perfectly straight solid lines.
options.b: They must be drawn with a red pen to represent hot electricity.
options.c: They show the exact path that the electrical current takes.
options.d: They are drawn as a circle with a cross inside.

questions.explanation: Dây dẫn (connecting wires) luôn được vẽ bằng đường thẳng nét đứt (A) và thể hiện đường đi của dòng điện (C). Không bắt buộc dùng bút đỏ (B) và vòng tròn chữ X là của bóng đèn (D).

questions.question: In a high-tech "apartment" (Unit 10), the smart door lock uses a circuit. When the owner inputs the correct password, the computer sends a signal that changes the door's internal circuit from an [[open switch|closed switch|broken wire|empty cell]] to a closed switch, allowing power to move the locking mechanism.
questions.explanation: Bình thường cửa khóa (mất điện/mạch hở - open switch). Nhập đúng pass, mạch đóng lại (closed switch) để cấp điện mở chốt cửa.

questions.question: Evaluate the statement: "If a student creates a circuit using a 3V battery but connects it to a bulb that is only designed to handle 1.5V, the bulb will operate normally for a very long time."
questions.explanation: Đưa điện áp 3V vào một bóng đèn chỉ chịu được 1.5V sẽ làm bóng đèn cháy/đứt dây tóc ngay lập tức (blown bulb) do quá tải điện áp. Nó sẽ không thể hoạt động bình thường.

questions.question: Reorder the following words to create a grammatically correct sentence comparing two circuit components using the comparative form.
questions.explanation: Ôn tập ngữ pháp So sánh hơn (Comparative): S + is + more + adj dài (powerful) + than + N.

questions.question: Match the conceptual component of a circuit (Left) with an everyday analogy to help a beginner understand how electricity works (Right).
rightCol: The water pump that pushes water through the pipes.
The hollow pipes that carry the water around the house.
A water wheel that uses the moving water to do work.
A valve or tap that can stop or start the flow of water.

answer.The Battery/Cell: The water pump that pushes water through the pipes.
answer.The Connecting Wires: The hollow pipes that carry the water around the house.
answer.The Bulb or Buzzer: A water wheel that uses the moving water to do work.
answer.The Switch: A valve or tap that can stop or start the flow of water.

questions.explanation: Sử dụng mô hình tương tự (Analogy) về dòng nước để học sinh hiểu sâu bản chất vật lý của dòng điện thay vì chỉ học vẹt.

questions.question: Examine the text: "The environmentalists are protesting the construction of traditional power plants. They argue that we should power our future 'skyscrapers' and 'apartments' using clean ______ instead of burning fossil fuels, which pollutes the atmosphere." Which term from MOET Unit 10 best fits this context?
questions.explanation: Để thay thế nhiên liệu hóa thạch gây ô nhiễm và cung cấp năng lượng sạch cho các tòa nhà, "solar energy" (năng lượng mặt trời) là đáp án duy nhất đúng về ngữ nghĩa và ngữ cảnh.

questions.question: Complete the rule for drawing diagrams: "When drawing a ... (7-letter word meaning 'a set of power cells joined together'), you must ensure the longer line represents the positive (+) terminal and the shorter, thicker line represents the negative (-) terminal."
questions.explanation: Bộ nguồn gồm nhiều cells ghép lại gọi là "battery".

questions.question: Identify the components required for specific specialized circuits. Classify the following components into those needed for a "Visual Alert System" vs an "Audio Alert System".
nhom: Visual Alert System (Hệ thống cảnh báo bằng mắt)
Audio Alert System (Hệ thống cảnh báo bằng âm thanh)
questions.explanation: Bóng đèn và vỏ thủy tinh phục vụ việc phát sáng (Visual). Còi và nón khuếch đại âm thanh phục vụ việc báo động bằng tiếng ồn (Audio).

questions.question: "In the year 2050, a family living in a [[houseboat|thunderstorm|cell|open switch]] relies entirely on a complex circuit of solar panels on their roof to generate electricity while they float down the river."
questions.explanation: Nơi ở trôi nổi trên sông (float down the river) là đặc trưng của "houseboat" (nhà nổi/thuyền nhà).

questions.question: Evaluate the scientific logic: "If lightning strikes a house, it inputs millions of volts of natural electricity into the home's internal wiring. Since the home's 'closed switches' are only designed for 220V, the massive surge will likely melt the connecting wires and cause a fire."
questions.explanation: Lập luận logic hoàn toàn chính xác. Hệ thống dây dẫn (connecting wires) nhân tạo có giới hạn chịu đựng (220V). Sét đánh mang hàng triệu Volts sẽ gây quá tải trầm trọng, làm nóng chảy dây và gây hỏa hoạn.

questions.question: Reorder the following sentence to describe the consequence of poor circuit design.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc câu điều kiện loại 1 (First Conditional) miêu tả một sự thật vật lý: Dây quá mỏng sẽ bị nóng lên nguy hiểm do điện trở.

questions.question: A student is reading a science manual to build a small robotic toy. The instructions state: "You must provide a power source of exactly 3 Volts to make the motor run." The student looks in the supply box and only finds standard 1.5V power units. What must the student do, and what is the scientific name for this new combined unit?

options.a: Use one 1.5V unit; it is called a cell.
options.b: Join two 1.5V units together; it is called a battery.
options.c: Join three 1.5V units together; it is called a buzzer.
options.d: Cut a 1.5V unit in half; it is called an open switch.

questions.explanation: Một đơn vị 1.5V gọi là "Cell" (Pin đơn). Để có 3V, học sinh phải ghép 2 cells lại. Khi hai hoặc nhiều cells ghép lại với nhau, hệ thống đó mới được gọi chính thức là "Battery" (Bộ pin).

questions.question: Analyze the following text from a physics textbook: "When scientists and engineers design complex electrical systems, they do not draw realistic, detailed pictures of every single component because it takes too much time and space. Instead, they use a universal set of simple, standardized lines and shapes called circuit ... to represent each part clearly." Fill in the blank with a plural noun.
questions.explanation: Các đường nét và hình khối tiêu chuẩn dùng để vẽ mạch điện được gọi là "Circuit symbols" (Ký hiệu mạch điện).

questions.question: Evaluate the following logical deduction made by a 6th-grade student: "In everyday language, my mom tells me to 'open the light' when the room is dark. Therefore, in a scientific circuit diagram, if I want the bulb to light up and shine brightly, I must ensure the diagram shows an 'open switch'."
questions.explanation: Đây là "Bẫy Tư duy ngược" kinh điển. Trong Khoa học, "Open switch" (công tắc mở) có nghĩa là mạch bị hở/đứt đoạn -> dòng điện KHÔNG chạy qua -> đèn TẮT. Để đèn sáng, ta phải dùng "Closed switch" (công tắc đóng) để tạo mạch kín.

questions.question: An electrical engineer is testing various circuit configurations on a simulator. Classify the following circuit descriptions based on whether the final output device (bulb/buzzer) will currently ACTIVATE (turn on) or FAIL TO ACTIVATE (stay off).
the: A circuit with a 3V battery, intact connecting wires, and a closed switch.
A circuit with a 1.5V cell, a broken wire, and a closed switch.
A circuit with a battery, intact wires, and an open switch.
A simple unbroken loop of wire connecting a cell directly to a buzzer with no switch.
questions.explanation: Mạch bị đứt dây (broken wire) hoặc công tắc hở (open switch) sẽ làm mạch hỏng (FAIL). Mạch kín hoàn toàn, dù có hay không có công tắc, thiết bị vẫn sẽ hoạt động (ACTIVATE).

questions.question: Match the precise scientific names of the circuit components (Left) with their standard visual representations in a circuit diagram (Right).
rightCol: A long thin line next to a shorter, thicker line.
Two or more pairs of long and short lines connected together.
A simple, straight, solid black line.
A circle with a cross (X) drawn inside it.

answer.A Cell: A long thin line next to a shorter, thicker line.
answer.A Battery: Two or more pairs of long and short lines connected together.
answer.A Connecting Wire: A simple, straight, solid black line.
answer.A Bulb: A circle with a cross (X) drawn inside it.

questions.explanation: Học sinh bắt buộc phải thuộc lòng các ký hiệu mạch điện (Circuit symbols) cơ bản nhất để làm bài thi Science.

questions.question: Reorder the steps logically to describe the sequential flow of electrical energy in a successfully operating, simple alarm circuit.
muc: (1) Electrical energy leaves the positive terminal of the 3V battery.
(2) The current travels along the copper connecting wire.
(3) The current passes safely through the closed switch.
(4) The energy reaches the buzzer, converting the electrical energy into a loud sound.
(5) The current continues along the wire back to the negative terminal, completing the loop.
answer: (1) Electrical energy leaves the positive terminal of the 3V battery.
(2) The current travels along the copper connecting wire.
(3) The current passes safely through the closed switch.
(4) The energy reaches the buzzer, converting the electrical energy into a loud sound.
(5) The current continues along the wire back to the negative terminal, completing the loop.
questions.explanation: Dòng điện chạy từ cực dương, qua dây dẫn, qua công tắc đóng, tới thiết bị tiêu thụ (còi), và trở về cực âm tạo thành một vòng khép kín.

questions.question: Read the scenario: "The security team wants to install a warning system on the vault door. When the door is opened by a thief, it acts as a closed switch, completing a hidden circuit. To ensure the guards hear the alarm immediately, the engineer must include a [[buzzer|bulb|cell|wire]] in the circuit design."
questions.explanation: Hệ thống cảnh báo cần âm thanh để bảo vệ (hear the alarm), do đó thiết bị cần thêm vào là "buzzer" (còi báo). Bulb (bóng đèn) chỉ phát sáng chứ không phát ra tiếng động.

questions.question: A student raises their hand in the science lab and says, "Teacher, I built the circuit exactly as shown. I have a battery, a switch, and a bulb. My switch is currently in the 'closed' position, but the bulb is NOT lighting up at all!" Based on troubleshooting logic, which of the following are valid scientific reasons for this failure? (Select 2 correct answers).

options.a: One of the connecting wires has a hidden break inside the plastic cover.
options.b: The battery has completely run out of stored chemical energy (it is dead/flat).
options.c: The switch is successfully creating a continuous, unbroken path for the electricity.
options.d: The circuit contains a cell instead of a buzzer.

questions.explanation: Mặc dù công tắc đã đóng (closed), nhưng nếu dây đứt ngầm (a) hoặc pin đã hết điện (b) thì mạch vẫn không hoạt động. Phương án (c) là điều kiện tốt, không phải nguyên nhân gây lỗi.

questions.question: Examine the technical specifications for a new smart home device (MOET Unit 10 integration): "This wireless temperature sensor is extremely small and requires very little voltage to operate. In fact, a 3V battery would overload and fry the system." Based on this, what is the most appropriate power source to draw in the circuit diagram for this sensor?

options.a: A single 1.5V cell (one long line, one short line).
options.b: A 3V battery (two pairs of long and short lines).

questions.explanation: 3V là quá tải (overload), thiết bị cần điện áp rất nhỏ. Do đó, nguồn điện phù hợp nhất là một "Cell" (Pin đơn) có điện áp 1.5V.

questions.question: Complete the sentence from a laboratory safety guideline: "When you have finished your experiment, you must immediately press the button to create an ... (a state where the circuit is broken). This stops the flow of electricity and prevents the battery from draining unnecessarily."
questions.explanation: Trạng thái làm ngắt mạch điện, ngăn dòng điện chạy qua là "open switch" (công tắc mở).

questions.question: Evaluate this statement made by a peer: "If I draw a circuit diagram with a battery, a wire, and a bulb, but the wire is drawn as a squiggly, messy line instead of a straight line with a ruler, the actual physical circuit built from this diagram will definitely not work."
questions.explanation: Sơ đồ mạch điện (circuit diagram) thường dùng đường thẳng cho gọn gàng, nhưng việc vẽ dây dẫn ngoằn ngoèo trên giấy KHÔNG làm ảnh hưởng đến nguyên lý hoạt động của mạch thực tế, miễn là các kết nối không bị đứt.

questions.question: A technician is diagnosing a faulty doorbell. The homeowner presses the button, but there is no sound. The technician checks the power source and finds it is a single 1.5V cell. The doorbell's manual states: "Minimum operating voltage requirement: 3 Volts." The technician realizes he needs to replace the cell with a [[battery|bulb|open switch|wire]].
questions.explanation: Thiết bị cần tối thiểu 3V. Một "cell" chỉ có 1.5V. Kỹ thuật viên cần nâng cấp lên "battery" (bộ pin ghép từ 2 cells trở lên) để đạt 3V.

questions.question: Reorder the components to correctly construct a standard, scientifically accurate written description of a functioning simple circuit, starting from the power source.
muc: (1) A 1.5V cell provides the necessary electrical energy.
(2) A connecting wire carries the current away from the cell.
(3) A closed switch allows the current to safely pass through without interruption.
(4) A bulb receives the current and converts it into light energy.
(5) Another connecting wire returns the current to the cell, completing the circuit.
answer: (1) A 1.5V cell provides the necessary electrical energy.
(2) A connecting wire carries the current away from the cell.
(3) A closed switch allows the current to safely pass through without interruption.
(4) A bulb receives the current and converts it into light energy.
(5) Another connecting wire returns the current to the cell, completing the circuit.
questions.explanation: Mô tả tuần tự các thành phần trên đường đi của dòng điện trong một mạch kín.

questions.question: Match the visual characteristic of a circuit symbol (Left) with the specific component it represents (Right) to test visual memory of Science Unit 5.4.
leftCol: Two small circles with a straight line bridging the gap between them.
Two small circles with a line pointing diagonally upwards, creating a gap.
A half-circle shape with two small legs sticking out from the flat bottom.
A circle containing a large \"X\" through the middle.
questions.explanation: Học sinh cần nhớ chính xác các chi tiết nhỏ trong ký hiệu (đặc biệt là sự khác biệt giữa open và closed switch, và hình dạng của buzzer).

questions.question: Classify the following scenarios to determine if they describe a system that is "In Series" (one single continuous path) or "Broken/Incomplete" (current cannot flow).
the: Cell $\\rightarrow$ Wire $\\rightarrow$ Closed Switch $\\rightarrow$ Bulb $\\rightarrow$ Cell.
Battery $\\rightarrow$ Wire $\\rightarrow$ Open Switch $\\rightarrow$ Buzzer $\\rightarrow$ Battery.
Battery $\\rightarrow$ Wire $\\rightarrow$ Bulb $\\rightarrow$ Wire $\\rightarrow$ (Cut end of wire).
questions.explanation: Mạch có "Open Switch" hoặc "Cut end of wire" (dây bị cắt) đều là mạch hở (Incomplete). Mạch không có công tắc nhưng khép kín hoàn toàn vẫn là mạch hoạt động (Complete).

questions.question: Look at the mental image of this circuit diagram: There is a 3V battery at the top. A wire goes down to an open switch. From the switch, the wire goes to a bulb. From the bulb, the wire goes to a buzzer. Finally, the wire returns to the battery. If you look at this circuit right now, what is happening?

options.a: The bulb is shining brightly, and the buzzer is loud.
options.b: The bulb is off, but the buzzer is making a sound.
options.c: Neither the bulb nor the buzzer is working.

questions.explanation: Vì công tắc đang ở trạng thái "open switch" (mở/ngắt mạch), toàn bộ dòng điện bị chặn lại. Do đó, KHÔNG có thiết bị nào (cả đèn và còi) có thể hoạt động.

questions.question: Complete the physics concept: "The electrical pressure that pushes the current through the connecting wires in a circuit is measured in units called ... (a 5-letter word starting with V)."
questions.explanation: Điện áp (Voltage) đo bằng đơn vị "volts" (V), ví dụ 1.5V hay 3V.

questions.question: A homeowner is trying to install a "wireless TV" (from MOET Unit 10) in their motorhome. However, the TV requires a direct connection to the vehicle's internal power circuit to function initially. The engineer draws a circuit diagram. Which of the following symbols MUST be present in the diagram to ensure the TV receives power and can be turned on and off safely? (Select 2 correct answers).

options.a: A battery symbol (to provide strong power).
options.b: A buzzer symbol (to make it loud).
options.c: A switch symbol (to control the power flow).
options.d: A cloud symbol (to connect to Wi-Fi).

questions.explanation: Để mạch điện TV hoạt động và có thể điều khiển được, bắt buộc phải có Nguồn điện (Battery) và thiết bị điều khiển đóng/ngắt mạch (Switch).

questions.question: Read the troubleshooting guide for a flashlight: "If the flashlight does not turn on when you slide the button forward, first check the power source. The flashlight requires 3V to operate. If you open the casing and only see a single 1.5V [[cell|battery|bulb|buzzer]], the device will not have enough power to produce light."
questions.explanation: Một viên pin 1.5V là "cell". Nó không đủ điện áp 3V để đèn pin hoạt động.

questions.question: Evaluate the statement: "In a circuit diagram, drawing two cells connected together (a long line, a short line, another long line, another short line) represents a 3V battery."
questions.explanation: Ký hiệu của "Battery" chính xác là hai hoặc nhiều "Cells" ghép nối tiếp nhau. Mỗi cell 1.5V, hai cells sẽ là 3V. Nhận định này hoàn toàn đúng.

questions.question: Match the action performed on a physical circuit (Left) with the resulting change in the circuit diagram's scientific symbols (Right).
leftCol: You press the alarm button down to activate the siren.
You add a second 1.5V power unit into the battery holder.
You accidentally cut the copper cord with a pair of scissors.
You replace the light-emitting device with a sound-emitting device.
rightCol: The symbol changes from an 'open switch' to a 'closed switch'.
The symbol changes from a single 'cell' to a 'battery'.
The solid 'connecting wire' line now has a gap in it.
The 'circle with an X' is replaced by a 'half-circle with legs'.

answer.You press the alarm button down to activ: The symbol changes from an 'open switch' to a 'closed switch'.
answer.You add a second 1.5V power unit into th: The symbol changes from a single 'cell' to a 'battery'.
answer.You accidentally cut the copper cord wit: The solid 'connecting wire' line now has a gap in it.
answer.You replace the light-emitting device wi: The 'circle with an X' is replaced by a 'half-circle with legs'.

questions.explanation: Đòi hỏi sự liên kết giữa hành động thực tế và cách biểu diễn trừu tượng trên sơ đồ mạch điện.

questions.question: An architect is designing a circuit for an "electric cooker" (Unit 10) in a modern apartment. Order the steps taken by the electricity from the moment the user interacts with the appliance.
muc: (1) The user pushes the power button on the cooker.
(2) Inside the machine, an open switch becomes a closed switch.
(3) The 220V electrical current flows rapidly through the connecting wires.
(4) The electricity reaches the heating elements, converting into thermal energy.
(5) The electric cooker successfully heats up the food.
answer: (1) The user pushes the power button on the cooker.
(2) Inside the machine, an open switch becomes a closed switch.
(3) The 220V electrical current flows rapidly through the connecting wires.
(4) The electricity reaches the heating elements, converting into thermal energy.
(5) The electric cooker successfully heats up the food.
questions.explanation: Quá trình chuyển đổi từ hành động bấm nút -> Đóng mạch -> Dòng điện chạy -> Chuyển hóa năng lượng -> Kết quả.

questions.question: Distinguish between the vocabulary of Global English (Nature's Power) and Science (Circuits). Classify the following terms based on their primary subject context.
questions.explanation: Giúp học sinh phân định rõ ràng các thuật ngữ liên môn. (Lightning là dòng điện tự nhiên, Cell/Switch là linh kiện nhân tạo).

questions.question: A student designs a simple circuit to test materials. The circuit consists of a battery, a bulb, and two loose connecting wires. When the student touches the two loose wires to a metal spoon, the bulb lights up. When the student touches the wires to a plastic ruler, the bulb remains dark. What does this experiment prove about the "connecting wires" and the circuit?

options.a: The plastic ruler acts as a closed switch, but the bulb is broken.
options.b: The metal spoon completes the circuit, acting like an extra connecting wire.
options.c: The battery is empty when touching the plastic ruler.
options.d: The metal spoon turns into a 3V battery.

questions.explanation: Kim loại (spoon) dẫn điện, nên nó kết nối hai đầu dây lỏng lẻo, hoàn thành mạch điện (completes the circuit) giống như một đoạn dây dẫn (connecting wire). Nhựa cách điện nên mạch vẫn hở.

questions.question: Complete the definition from the exam review sheet: "A ... (7-letter word) is an electrical component that converts electrical energy into an audible warning sound. Its circuit symbol looks like a mushroom or a half-circle on two legs."
questions.explanation: Thiết bị chuyển điện thành âm thanh (audible sound) có hình nửa vòng tròn (half-circle) là "buzzer" (còi báo).

questions.question: In a circuit diagram, the straight lines representing the [[connecting wires|hot air|clouds|thunder]] must always be drawn completely touching the components (like the cell or bulb) to show that there is no break in the electrical path.
questions.explanation: Các đường thẳng trong sơ đồ mạch điện biểu diễn "connecting wires" (dây dẫn) và phải chạm vào linh kiện để tạo mạch kín.

questions.question: Evaluate the scientific statement: "If you have a circuit with a 3V battery, a closed switch, and two bulbs connected one after the other in a single loop, removing one of the bulbs will leave an empty gap, causing the other bulb to turn off."
questions.explanation: Trong một mạch nối tiếp (single loop), nếu tháo một bóng đèn ra, nó sẽ tạo ra một khoảng hở (gap) giống như một open switch. Toàn bộ mạch bị ngắt và bóng đèn còn lại cũng sẽ tắt. Lập luận vật lý chính xác.

questions.question: Which of the following components are mathematically required to build a standard "3V battery" according to the Cambridge Science curriculum? (Select 2 correct answers).

options.c: Connecting them so their voltages add up ($1.5V + 1.5V = 3V$).
options.d: A buzzer to multiply the voltage.

questions.explanation: Để có một "3V battery", ta phải kết hợp hai viên pin đơn (b) và cộng gộp điện áp của chúng lại $1.5 + 1.5 = 3$ (c). Còi (buzzer) không sinh ra điện.

questions.question: Match the real-world household actions (from MOET Unit 10) with the internal circuit changes occurring inside the appliances.
leftCol: You turn off the "electric cooker" because the rice is done.
You put two new AA batteries into the "wireless TV" remote.
You plug the "dishwasher" into the wall socket.
A rat chews through the main cable of your "solar energy" system.
rightCol: The internal switch changes from 'closed' to 'open'.
You are adding a 3V power source to the circuit.
You are connecting the device to a massive external power grid.
A 'connecting wire' is severely broken, creating an incomplete circuit.

answer.You turn off the \"electric cooker\" bec: The internal switch changes from 'closed' to 'open'.
answer.You put two new AA batteries into the \": You are adding a 3V power source to the circuit.
answer.You plug the \"dishwasher\" into the wal: You are connecting the device to a massive external power grid.
answer.A rat chews through the main cable of yo: A 'connecting wire' is severely broken, creating an incomplete circuit.

questions.explanation: Tích hợp kiến thức Science vào tình huống thực tế của chủ đề "Houses in the Future".

questions.question: Reorder the words to form a crucial rule for drawing scientific circuit diagrams correctly.
questions.explanation: Quy tắc vẽ sơ đồ chuẩn: "Always use a ruler to draw the connecting wires as straight lines."

questions.question: Look at this described circuit: A 3V battery is connected by a wire to a closed switch. From the switch, a wire splits into two separate paths. Path A goes to a bulb. Path B goes to a buzzer. Both paths then return via wire to the battery. What happens if the bulb suddenly breaks?

options.a: Both the bulb and the buzzer stop working.
options.b: The bulb stops working, but the buzzer continues to make a sound.
options.c: The buzzer stops working, but the bulb shines brighter.

questions.explanation: Vì mạch bị chia làm hai nhánh riêng biệt (mạch song song - parallel circuit), sự cố đứt mạch ở bóng đèn (Path A) không ảnh hưởng đến dòng điện đang chạy qua còi (Path B). Còi vẫn kêu bình thường.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: "In a circuit diagram, the symbol for a bulb is a circle with a cross inside it, which looks like a capital letter ... ." (Type a single English letter).
questions.explanation: Ký hiệu của bóng đèn (bulb) là một vòng tròn có chữ "X" (cross) ở giữa.

questions.question: Classify the electrical components based on their primary function in a circuit: "Source of Energy" (Provides power) or "Consumer of Energy" (Uses power).
nhom: Source of Energy (Cung cấp năng lượng)
Consumer of Energy (Tiêu thụ năng lượng)
questions.explanation: Cell, Battery, Solar Panel là các nguồn phát điện. Bóng đèn, còi, nồi cơm điện là các thiết bị tiêu thụ và chuyển hóa điện năng.

questions.question: When writing an exam paper, a student mistakenly draws a long line and a short line, followed by a gap, and then another long line and short line. This is incorrect. To properly draw a [[battery|cell|buzzer|bulb]], the lines representing the multiple cells must be connected with a dotted or solid line to show they are joined.
questions.explanation: Ký hiệu của Battery (nhiều cells) không được rời rạc mà phải có đường nét gạch nối (dotted/solid line) giữa các cặp đường dài/ngắn để thể hiện chúng đang được ghép lại với nhau.

questions.question: Evaluate this safety warning: "If you connect a simple wire directly from the positive terminal of a 3V battery straight back to the negative terminal without adding any bulb or buzzer in the middle, the circuit will safely do nothing."
questions.explanation: Đây là hiện tượng đoản mạch (short circuit). Dòng điện quá lớn sẽ chạy qua dây dẫn mà không bị cản lại bởi thiết bị tiêu thụ nào, khiến pin và dây dẫn cực kỳ nóng, có thể gây cháy nổ. Khẳng định "safely do nothing" là sai và rất nguy hiểm.

questions.question: Match the diagnostic observation of a circuit (Left) with the most highly probable technical fault (Right).
leftCol: The bulb was shining brightly, but suddenly went completely dark without anyone touching the switch.
The circuit is fully assembled with a closed switch, but the buzzer is completely silent from the start.
The diagram shows a 3V battery, but the physical circuit only has one single cell.
The switch is pressed down, but the metallic contacts inside it are dirty and rusted.
rightCol: The filament inside the bulb has broken (the bulb blew out).
The 1.5V cell was accidentally placed in the holder backwards.
The physical model does not match the required voltage of the blueprint.
The switch is failing to create a proper electrical connection.

answer.The bulb was shining brightly, but sudde: The filament inside the bulb has broken (the bulb blew out).
answer.The circuit is fully assembled with a cl: The 1.5V cell was accidentally placed in the holder backwards.
answer.The diagram shows a 3V battery, but the: The physical model does not match the required voltage of the blueprint.
answer.The switch is pressed down, but the meta: The switch is failing to create a proper electrical connection.

questions.explanation: Tư duy phân tích lỗi (Troubleshooting) ở cấp độ Vận dụng cao.

questions.question: Reorder the sentence to describe how a natural phenomenon from Unit 7 can affect an artificial circuit from Unit 5.4.
questions.explanation: Kết nối đa môn (Cross-curricular): Bão sấm sét (hiện tượng tự nhiên) phá hủy dây dẫn điện (linh kiện nhân tạo).

questions.question: An engineer is modifying a circuit diagram for a warning system. Currently, the diagram shows a cell, a closed switch, and a buzzer. The engineer erases the 'closed switch' symbol and draws an 'open switch' symbol instead. What is the immediate physical consequence of this drawing change on the real-life machine built from it?

options.a: The machine will now produce a louder sound.
options.b: The machine is now permanently turned off and will not make a sound.
options.c: The machine will explode due to high voltage.
options.d: The buzzer will turn into a bulb.

questions.explanation: Việc đổi từ "closed switch" (mạch kín) sang "open switch" (mạch hở) trên bản thiết kế đồng nghĩa với việc cỗ máy thực tế sẽ luôn ở trạng thái bị ngắt điện (turned off).

questions.question: Fill in the blank: "In standard scientific notation, a 1.5V ... (a 4-letter word) is the fundamental building block of all portable power sources. When you need more power, you combine several of them."
questions.explanation: "Cell" (pin đơn) là đơn vị nền tảng nhỏ nhất để tạo ra các nguồn năng lượng di động.

questions.question: Which of the following statements about "Connecting wires" in a circuit diagram are TRUE? (Select 2 correct answers).

options.a: They are always drawn as perfectly straight solid lines.
options.b: They must be drawn with a red pen to represent hot electricity.
options.c: They show the exact path that the electrical current takes.
options.d: They are drawn as a circle with a cross inside.

questions.explanation: Dây dẫn (connecting wires) luôn được vẽ bằng đường thẳng nét đứt (A) và thể hiện đường đi của dòng điện (C). Không bắt buộc dùng bút đỏ (B) và vòng tròn chữ X là của bóng đèn (D).

questions.question: In a high-tech "apartment" (Unit 10), the smart door lock uses a circuit. When the owner inputs the correct password, the computer sends a signal that changes the door's internal circuit from an [[open switch|closed switch|broken wire|empty cell]] to a closed switch, allowing power to move the locking mechanism.
questions.explanation: Bình thường cửa khóa (mất điện/mạch hở - open switch). Nhập đúng pass, mạch đóng lại (closed switch) để cấp điện mở chốt cửa.

questions.question: Evaluate the statement: "If a student creates a circuit using a 3V battery but connects it to a bulb that is only designed to handle 1.5V, the bulb will operate normally for a very long time."
questions.explanation: Đưa điện áp 3V vào một bóng đèn chỉ chịu được 1.5V sẽ làm bóng đèn cháy/đứt dây tóc ngay lập tức (blown bulb) do quá tải điện áp. Nó sẽ không thể hoạt động bình thường.

questions.question: Reorder the following words to create a grammatically correct sentence comparing two circuit components using the comparative form.
questions.explanation: Ôn tập ngữ pháp So sánh hơn (Comparative): S + is + more + adj dài (powerful) + than + N.

questions.question: Match the conceptual component of a circuit (Left) with an everyday analogy to help a beginner understand how electricity works (Right).
rightCol: The water pump that pushes water through the pipes.
The hollow pipes that carry the water around the house.
A water wheel that uses the moving water to do work.
A valve or tap that can stop or start the flow of water.

answer.The Battery/Cell: The water pump that pushes water through the pipes.
answer.The Connecting Wires: The hollow pipes that carry the water around the house.
answer.The Bulb or Buzzer: A water wheel that uses the moving water to do work.
answer.The Switch: A valve or tap that can stop or start the flow of water.

questions.explanation: Sử dụng mô hình tương tự (Analogy) về dòng nước để học sinh hiểu sâu bản chất vật lý của dòng điện thay vì chỉ học vẹt.

questions.question: Examine the text: "The environmentalists are protesting the construction of traditional power plants. They argue that we should power our future 'skyscrapers' and 'apartments' using clean ______ instead of burning fossil fuels, which pollutes the atmosphere." Which term from MOET Unit 10 best fits this context?
questions.explanation: Để thay thế nhiên liệu hóa thạch gây ô nhiễm và cung cấp năng lượng sạch cho các tòa nhà, "solar energy" (năng lượng mặt trời) là đáp án duy nhất đúng về ngữ nghĩa và ngữ cảnh.

questions.question: Complete the rule for drawing diagrams: "When drawing a ... (7-letter word meaning 'a set of power cells joined together'), you must ensure the longer line represents the positive (+) terminal and the shorter, thicker line represents the negative (-) terminal."
questions.explanation: Bộ nguồn gồm nhiều cells ghép lại gọi là "battery".

questions.question: Identify the components required for specific specialized circuits. Classify the following components into those needed for a "Visual Alert System" vs an "Audio Alert System".
nhom: Visual Alert System (Hệ thống cảnh báo bằng mắt)
Audio Alert System (Hệ thống cảnh báo bằng âm thanh)
questions.explanation: Bóng đèn và vỏ thủy tinh phục vụ việc phát sáng (Visual). Còi và nón khuếch đại âm thanh phục vụ việc báo động bằng tiếng ồn (Audio).

questions.question: "In the year 2050, a family living in a [[houseboat|thunderstorm|cell|open switch]] relies entirely on a complex circuit of solar panels on their roof to generate electricity while they float down the river."
questions.explanation: Nơi ở trôi nổi trên sông (float down the river) là đặc trưng của "houseboat" (nhà nổi/thuyền nhà).

questions.question: Evaluate the scientific logic: "If lightning strikes a house, it inputs millions of volts of natural electricity into the home's internal wiring. Since the home's 'closed switches' are only designed for 220V, the massive surge will likely melt the connecting wires and cause a fire."
questions.explanation: Lập luận logic hoàn toàn chính xác. Hệ thống dây dẫn (connecting wires) nhân tạo có giới hạn chịu đựng (220V). Sét đánh mang hàng triệu Volts sẽ gây quá tải trầm trọng, làm nóng chảy dây và gây hỏa hoạn.

questions.question: Reorder the following sentence to describe the consequence of poor circuit design.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc câu điều kiện loại 1 (First Conditional) miêu tả một sự thật vật lý: Dây quá mỏng sẽ bị nóng lên nguy hiểm do điện trở.

questions.question: A young inventor is experimenting with an old flashlight. The original design uses two 1.5V cells to power a small bulb. Wanting to make the flashlight incredibly bright, the inventor connects four 1.5V cells together in series (creating a 6V battery) and connects them to the same small bulb. What is the most scientifically likely outcome of this experiment?

options.a: The bulb will shine twice as brightly and last forever.
options.b: The bulb will explode or its filament will burn out immediately due to excessive voltage.
options.c: The bulb will not turn on because the voltage is too high for the switch to process.
options.d: The cells will automatically reduce their voltage to protect the bulb.

questions.explanation: Bóng đèn nhỏ được thiết kế cho điện áp 3V. Đưa 6V (gấp đôi mức cho phép) vào sẽ gây quá tải dòng điện, làm đứt dây tóc (burn out/blow) ngay lập tức.

questions.question: Analyze the scientific definition: "For electricity to flow and power a device, there must be a completely unbroken, continuous path from the power source, through the components, and back to the power source. This entire unbroken loop is scientifically referred to as a closed ... ." (Fill in the blank with a 7-letter word).
questions.explanation: Một vòng lặp khép kín cho dòng điện chạy qua được gọi là "closed circuit" (mạch kín).

questions.question: Evaluate this student's theory about circuit design: "In a simple series circuit consisting of a battery, a wire, a bulb, and a switch, the switch must ALWAYS be placed exactly between the battery's positive terminal and the bulb. If you place the switch after the bulb, it will not be able to turn the bulb off."
questions.explanation: Trong một mạch nối tiếp (series circuit), công tắc (switch) có thể đặt ở BẤT KỲ VỊ TRÍ NÀO. Miễn là công tắc mở, nó sẽ ngắt toàn bộ vòng lặp và dòng điện sẽ ngừng chảy ở mọi điểm, làm đèn tắt.

questions.question: Read the blueprint instructions: "To power the heavy-duty industrial buzzer, a massive amount of electrical pressure is required. Therefore, the diagram must accurately depict a [[cell|battery|bulb|connecting wire]] by drawing multiple pairs of long and short lines connected together, indicating a high-voltage power source."
questions.explanation: "Multiple pairs of long and short lines" (nhiều cặp nét dài/ngắn) là ký hiệu của "battery" (bộ pin ghép), cung cấp điện áp cao hơn "cell".

questions.question: A technician is troubleshooting a broken alarm system. Order the logical steps the technician should take to identify the fault in the circuit, following standard scientific methods.
muc: (1) Visually inspect the connecting wires for any cuts or breaks.
(2) Check if the switch mechanism is correctly moving to the 'closed' position.
(3) Test the power source (battery) with a voltmeter to ensure it is not dead.
(4) Replace the buzzer with a new one to see if the original was faulty.
(5) Successfully activate the alarm once the broken component is replaced.
answer: (1) Visually inspect the connecting wires for any cuts or breaks.
(2) Check if the switch mechanism is correctly moving to the 'closed' position.
(3) Test the power source (battery) with a voltmeter to ensure it is not dead.
(4) Replace the buzzer with a new one to see if the original was faulty.
(5) Successfully activate the alarm once the broken component is replaced.
questions.explanation: Quy trình bắt lỗi (troubleshooting): Kiểm tra dây -> Kiểm tra công tắc -> Đo pin -> Thử thay linh kiện tiêu thụ -> Hoàn thành.

questions.question: Match the specific fault in a physical circuit (Left) with the exact component that needs to be replaced or repaired (Right).
leftCol: The power source is completely drained of chemical energy.
The metallic contacts are rusted and cannot complete the path when pressed.
The copper line has been chewed completely through by a rat.
The glass is shattered and the internal filament is severed.
questions.explanation: Liên kết giữa hiện tượng vật lý hỏng hóc thực tế và linh kiện mạch điện tương ứng.

questions.question: To build successful circuits, one must understand materials. Classify the following materials into "Conductors" (allow electricity to flow, acting like a connecting wire) and "Insulators" (block electricity, acting like an open switch).
questions.explanation: Kim loại và nước muối dẫn điện tốt. Nhựa, cao su, gỗ khô cách điện.

questions.question: A student wants to modify their science project. The current circuit has one 1.5V cell, a closed switch, and a buzzer that sounds very faint and weak. Which of the following actions will successfully make the buzzer sound significantly LOUDER? (Select 2 correct answers).

options.a: Add another 1.5V cell in series to create a 3V battery.
options.b: Replace the buzzer with a bulb.
options.c: Replace the 1.5V cell with a more powerful 9V battery.
options.d: Change the closed switch into an open switch.

questions.explanation: Để còi kêu to hơn, cần cung cấp nhiều điện áp (Voltage) hơn bằng cách lắp thêm pin (A) hoặc dùng pin mạnh hơn (C). (Tuy nhiên thực tế phải cẩn thận không làm cháy còi, nhưng về lý thuyết tăng V sẽ tăng âm lượng/độ sáng).

questions.question: "In a highly sensitive circuit diagram for a medical device, the engineer accidentally drew the symbol for a 'Cell' upside down (short thick line on top, long thin line on the bottom). However, he kept the wire connections exactly the same." In reality, what does flipping a cell's orientation do to the circuit?

options.a: It turns the cell into a buzzer.
options.b: It reverses the direction of the electrical current flowing through the circuit.
options.d: It multiplies the voltage by two.

questions.explanation: Đảo ngược chiều viên pin (đổi cực âm/dương) sẽ làm đảo ngược chiều dòng điện chạy trong mạch (reverses the direction of the current).

questions.question: Fill in the blank: "A ... (4-letter word) is the simplest component in a circuit diagram that represents a light source. Without it, or a buzzer, you wouldn't easily know if the electrical current is successfully flowing."

Read the following real estate advertisement: "Are you tired of living in the same city forever? Do you love the open road and exploring new horizons every single day? Buy our latest model today! It comes fully equipped with a kitchen, a foldable bed, and a solar-powered engine. Drive your home wherever your heart desires." What type of house is being advertised?
questions.explanation: Cụm từ "open road" (đường chân trời), "Drive your home" (lái ngôi nhà của bạn) và có động cơ (engine) mô tả chính xác một chiếc nhà xe di động (Motorhome).

questions.question: Analyze the excerpt from a sci-fi architecture magazine: "By the year 2050, overpopulation in urban centers will force humanity to build upwards. We will see the rise of the mega-..., a massive building containing thousands of apartments, offices, and indoor farms, reaching heights of over 200 floors into the clouds." Fill in the blank with the correct 10-letter vocabulary word.
questions.explanation: Tòa nhà khổng lồ vươn lên mây ("reaching into the clouds", "build upwards", "200 floors") chính là nhà chọc trời (skyscraper).

questions.question: Match the specific lifestyle or geographical requirement (Left) with the most suitable type of future house from Unit 10 (Right).
leftCol: A family wanting to live permanently on a river, relying on fishing and water transport.
A billionaire looking for an enormous, luxurious residence with hundreds of rooms and gold decorations.
A young couple desiring a small, cozy, traditional home in a quiet countryside village.
An alien civilization visiting Earth, requiring a hovering, circular base.
questions.explanation: Kiểm tra khả năng hiểu nghĩa từ vựng thông qua ngữ cảnh mô tả nhu cầu nhà ở (Real-world Application).

questions.question: The future of housing involves both structural types and the advanced technologies inside them. Classify the following vocabulary words into their correct categories based on MOET Unit 10.
nhom: Types of Houses (Loại hình nhà ở)
questions.explanation: Phân loại rõ ràng giữa các danh từ chỉ nơi ở (Condominium, Apartment, Houseboat) và các danh từ chỉ thiết bị tiện ích (Dishwasher, Solar energy, Wireless TV).

questions.question: Evaluate the logic of the following statement found in a student's creative writing essay: "In the future, my dream is to live in a beautiful cottage located on the 85th floor of a bustling city center, where millions of cars pass by every minute."
questions.explanation: Bẫy từ vựng kết hợp logic. "Cottage" là nhà tranh/nhà nông thôn nhỏ bé, thường nằm ở vùng quê yên bình. Việc đặt một "cottage" trên tầng 85 của trung tâm thành phố ồn ào là hoàn toàn mâu thuẫn về mặt khái niệm địa lý và kiến trúc.
